[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17624611/201068101/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzlmMTMwMS01OTlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLED8Ne6_4RpcpKbdsWnNDWQxABznHuy7qNNnzJvw7o=&emci=3d0302fa-589f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=439f1301-599f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6233172)

Peter, **The days keep counting down to the runoff election on July 14 and with your help we will win!** We are holding a big virtual kickoff event on June 13th at 3:00pm CT — and we need you there. The COVID crisis has given our campaign some challenges but we are excited to bring people together from across the country for this special event. **Special guests will include labor leaders, climate activists, elected officials and musicians — you won’t want to miss it!** **[Will you join me on June 13th for this exciting virtual kickoff event? Buy your ticket now to power us to the Democratic nomination and beyond!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17624612/201068102/-1064211403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzlmMTMwMS01OTlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLED8Ne6_4RpcpKbdsWnNDWQxABznHuy7qNNnzJvw7o=&emci=3d0302fa-589f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=439f1301-599f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6233172)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17624613/201068103/-1064211403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzlmMTMwMS01OTlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLED8Ne6_4RpcpKbdsWnNDWQxABznHuy7qNNnzJvw7o=&emci=3d0302fa-589f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=439f1301-599f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6233172)
**It's so important that you join us for this critical event. This will be the moment when you can get the latest campaign updates and opportunities to get involved.** We have a bunch of amazing sponsors and hosts so far who have helped us put this event together. **[But, we need to grow this list even more to have a successful event — click here to sponsor our kickoff!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17624614/201068104/-1064211403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzlmMTMwMS01OTlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLED8Ne6_4RpcpKbdsWnNDWQxABznHuy7qNNnzJvw7o=&emci=3d0302fa-589f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=439f1301-599f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6233172)** We need your help to spread the word about this campaign all throughout this district. I look forward to you joining us on June 13th for this awesome event!

[RSVP for this important event RIGHT NOW!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17624615/201068105/-1064211403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzlmMTMwMS01OTlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLED8Ne6_4RpcpKbdsWnNDWQxABznHuy7qNNnzJvw7o=&emci=3d0302fa-589f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=439f1301-599f-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6233172)
Thank you for standing with us as we work hard to create real change in this district and fight to be the representative the Texas 10th needs. Fighting for you,

clean_body: Peter, The days keep counting down to the runoff election on July 14 and with your help we will win! We are holding a big virtual kickoff event on June 13th at 3:00pm CT — and we need you there. The COVID crisis has given our campaign some challenges but we are excited to bring people together from across the country for this special event. Special guests will include labor leaders, climate activists, elected officials and musicians — you won’t want to miss it! It's so important that you join us for this critical event. This will be the moment when you can get the latest campaign updates and opportunities to get involved. We have a bunch of amazing sponsors and hosts so far who have helped us put this event together. We need your help to spread the word about this campaign all throughout this district. I look forward to you joining us on June 13th for this awesome event! Thank you for standing with us as we work hard to create real change in this district and fight to be the representative the Texas 10th needs. Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

* * *
---
Dear Friend, When I kicked this campaign off in September of 2017, many people told me that events beyond my control would have to come into play to shift the balance in my favor. This has in fact happened:
* The incumbent announced his retirement
* The Republican nominee will be someone with significant vulnerabilities
* The COVID-19 pandemic has demonstrated the incalculable human and economic costs of divisive politics and an incompetent and an ill-prepared federal government.

All that means our message will resonate with a larger swath of the electorate. In addition, we've significantly improved our data analysis capability - we're well beyond ambiguous statements about needing to turn out this or that constituency. We have __very__ precise targets. We now have a clear and credible path to victory. And with your help, not only can we take this congressional seat, but this campaign can become the driving Democratic force in Central Texas and turn out votes for Biden, for our eventual senate nominee, and for our state house candidates that they might otherwise not be able to turn out themselves. The only piece of the puzzle missing is the funding to get it done. May has been a challenging month, and we're well short of our goal. I need your help to close the gap quickly, **[so please pitch in what you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17626400/201095437/-1907457919?refcode=052620_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTM5MTA3Mi02MjlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8RLE_KL0O8yXikz-11m4DUwrvpmNI7t2YPNQswJr2DY=). clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running to flip the open seat in the 17th District.= Dear Friend, When I kicked this campaign off in September of 2017, many people told me that events beyond my control would have to come into play to shift the balance in my favor. This has in fact happened: The incumbent announced his retirement The Republican nominee will be someone with significant vulnerabilities The COVID-19 pandemic has demonstrated the incalculable human and economic costs of divisive politics and an incompetent and an ill-prepared federal government. All that means our message will resonate with a larger swath of the electorate. In addition, we've significantly improved our data analysis capability - we're well beyond ambiguous statements about needing to turn out this or that constituency. We have very precise targets. We now have a clear and credible path to victory. And with your help, not only can we take this congressional seat, but this campaign can become the driving Democratic force in Central Texas and turn out votes for Biden, for our eventual senate nominee, and for our state house candidates that they might otherwise not be able to turn out themselves. The only piece of the puzzle missing is the funding to get it done. May has been a challenging month, and we're well short of our goal. I need your help to close the gap quickly, =. We can do this - together. If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, and stay safe. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: They'll Lose Everything if They Don't Open this Friday
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=restart_minnesota&n=1)
---
Peter -- Our mission at Action 4 Liberty since this pandemic began is to do everything in our power to End Governor Walz' Illegal Emergency Powers and return freedom to Minnesotans. It breaks my heart to hear the stories of businesses who have already shut their doors like the Bonfire Grill and the countless businesses on the cusp of failure if this illegal shutdown goes on any longer. **Last week, a hero emerged in all the chaos. His name is Kris Schiffler. He owns a bar/restaurant and event center in Albany, MN called Shady's.** Have you heard his story? He planned to defy the Governor's illegal order and restart his business. So our [awful Attorney General threatened him with fines, lawsuits and got an injunction against him](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkFao5aqRhf12UNMhwWAW9V185hbQ2a73UAXMX4qM0tN2zW_Z68BwtXhQjUiEu0lgHg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=restart_minnesota&n=2). Kris was unable to restart. But then something amazing happened... Thousands of bars, restaurants, resorts and other businesses throughout Minnesota reached out to him and said they wanted to join the cause and defy Walz' illegal orders themselves. Did you see that the archdiocese of St Paul and Minneapolis just successfully disobeyed the orders of our pitiful Governor when it came to worship? THIS can be done! Our businesses are vital to our communities. They create local jobs, provide products and services to our neighbors, and support our families. Many businesses operate seasonally and cannot survive two more weeks and are about to close - FOREVER. **The time has come for us to stand together; take back our Freedom and RESTART business now!** [Join us in supporting the unrestricted return of all businesses in Minnesota by pledging your support for Restart Minnesota on May 29th.](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=afXxtPs-_N4pGbIL6-begZJQ__S9ljROdEK6Nua1uMM&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=restart_minnesota&n=3) [](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=afXxtPs-_N4pGbIL6-begZJQ__S9ljROdEK6Nua1uMM&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=restart_minnesota&n=4) Own your own business and want to restart on Friday? Join the thousands of businesses from Luverne to Silver Bay by pledging to open your doors on May 29th. | [](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=afXxtPs-_N4pGbIL6-begZJQ__S9ljROdEK6Nua1uMM&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=restart_minnesota&n=5 "RESTART MINNESOTA PLEDGE") [RESTART MINNESOTA PLEDGE](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=afXxtPs-_N4pGbIL6-begZJQ__S9ljROdEK6Nua1uMM&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=restart_minnesota&n=6)
---
It's time for us to finally put an end to Walz' illegal orders and return freedom back to us so we can decide ourselves how to safely and reasonably restart our economy.
[Pledge your support NOW for Restart Minnesota on Friday, May 29th!](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=afXxtPs-_N4pGbIL6-begZJQ__S9ljROdEK6Nua1uMM&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=restart_minnesota&n=7)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=restart_minnesota&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=restart_minnesota&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=restart_minnesota&n=10), software for leaders.

There’s good reason the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) has taken notice of our campaign, and named Dr. Chuck an “On the Radar” candidate for their Young Guns Program. • His positive conservative message is resonating across the 5th District; • We’ve built a strong and effective campaign organization to keep this seat “RED”; • Dr. Chuck is prepared to make big contributions to the fight to build a strong, secure, and prosperous future for our great nation! They’re ready to stand by his side in this fight, with mentoring and direct support. But first, we need to WIN next week in this crowded Republican field! Your support right now could make all the difference. Every vote is going to count, and every dollar we raise helps us reach seven more potential Republican primary voters. Please help us reach our $7,500 goal by Sunday at midnight. With JUST DAYS to go, we still need to raise $4,311 online. . \- David | | | ---|--- id:2020-05-15-16:12:18:487t Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc.

body:
Being limited by money and resources is one of the most common reasons why popular, progressive movements end up falling short. We refuse to let this be our downfall.
#
This is exactly what we were afraid of happening.
Over the weekend, our fundraising slipped. **This puts us in a rough position to hit our $100,000 goal before May 31st. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17629105/201146807/957603295?refcode=em20200526&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRiZTNhZi03NDlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TH-MPFUaB8pDpIU42BpToV-x9mtBXbTz5_qrxmttpKE=)
**[We still have a chance to make it, but only if more people than usual step up and help out. If everyone reading this email chipped in $5 right now — we could make up for our fundraising loss over the weekend. Can you chip in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17629119/201146821/957603295?refcode=em20200526&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRiZTNhZi03NDlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TH-MPFUaB8pDpIU42BpToV-x9mtBXbTz5_qrxmttpKE=)**
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17629120/201146822/957603295?refcode=em20200526&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRiZTNhZi03NDlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TH-MPFUaB8pDpIU42BpToV-x9mtBXbTz5_qrxmttpKE=)**
We can’t afford to have any more bad fundraising days this close to the primary.
This is the time we should be raising record fundraising numbers and spending big on voter outreach. This is our time to show the establishment that we’re hungry for a candidate like Charles Booker and that this underdog can really win.
**Remember what we’re up against:** Amy McGrath’s team is receiving checks from her millionaire friends in the Democratic Party. They’re not worrying about fundraising like we are, but that’s the price we pay to make sure this is a people-powered movement.
**Unfortunately, being limited by money and resources is one of the most common reasons why popular, progressive movements end up falling short.** We refuse to let this be our downfall.
**[If you’re serious about the fight for bold, progressive change — please help us catch up on our fundraising so we can hit this critical $100,000 goal. Can you sacrifice whatever you can for our campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17629121/201146823/957603295?refcode=em20200526&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRiZTNhZi03NDlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TH-MPFUaB8pDpIU42BpToV-x9mtBXbTz5_qrxmttpKE=)**
**[Contribute $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17629122/201146824/957603295?refcode=em20200526&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRiZTNhZi03NDlmLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TH-MPFUaB8pDpIU42BpToV-x9mtBXbTz5_qrxmttpKE=)**
Thanks,
Team Booker

Hi Peter,

subject: Adam Kinzinger ❤ Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
Kinzinger seems rational sometimes, but he's a pro-Trump conservative that must be defeated. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c32e73ba099b/adam-kinzinger-donald-trump-3884829?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
My opponent, Adam Kinzinger, got some press this weekend for making a mildly critical statement about President Trump spreading a conspiracy theory that accused MSNBC's Joe Scarborough of murder.

"A rational Republican!" Some said. "Good on him for standing up to the President."

But he hasn’t. And he won’t. He could have stood up to the President any time Trump championed dismantling the ACA. He could have stood up to him when he started locking kids in cages.**He could have stood up to him when he dismantled the CDC’s pandemic response team. **

---
| [Chip in $10](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f431970ccf&e=140a9b81e7 "Chip in $10")

---
| Kinzinger making a fuss right now because he’s _scared_. He sees us coming and he knows his time is up. We’ve got the growing support of national organizations and an army of donors, but **it’s going to take every one of you for us to show Kinzinger just how nervous he should be. **

[Chip in today ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e0186daf2f&e=140a9b81e7)and send him a message: We are coming for your seat, Kinzinger.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Never expected this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats have the financial advantage with less than 6 months until Election Day. The End of Month deadline is 5 days away, and I need you to join this fight and stop a liberal takeover. Contribute now and your gift will be 5X MATCHED >>>

Friend,

We knew in 2020 Democrats would do everything they could to take back the White House and Senate, but we NEVER expected this.
* Democrats are outraising Republican incumbents by huge margins - sometimes doubling or even almost **TRIPLING** Republicans' totals.
* In red states, Democrats are rising in the polls and bringing in millions.
* Joe Biden just launched a $100 million ad blitz in must-win states.

This is worst case scenario. Democrats only need FOUR seats to take the Senate, and they have the financial advantage with less than 6 months until Election Day. **_The End of Month deadline is ju st 5 days away_**** _,_****_and I need you to join this fight and stop a liberal takeover._ **[**Contribute now and your gift will be 5X MATCHED >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VjALLo45yKYT9tp9Yv5MefJ5c0yG6HUlkOoSCWBWRxzOd7AtiaMlqqnCGHTBGnCaFJkAkIYQ8XpDbkksPHk1Q83g1N77d-yzfmEAKNEupV2HJxZ0Fzy6DX5FwIfgbPxRflJ_-7bY998o-lVYFasp3sOf7izhcQnHm6cKodBxoGKhJxny_CazY198kN-WTqxsshjm9vNsus_GepeQgG_aV9JYzRTus9KBU8F5hi6BvQ6ZdOqlmMshuauljciW1OVhVAnV0vmuLDygOIp7nxqGsBB4WwI59-Ky2FMApNvSxuLwMxt9-MjxE66UzJx_OlPwMCApIv7g7wwf0YUSWLqr_Fzb4rftMca673hnmQK44GgbexmDPrP5D0I9ggdXlnPuXV1Isd3dzabkvqnQO5A0lD7lK_qj6SVx90574PJxdeqtmKaIhpriu-3eF3of5EOU4N35xDmg75U=&c=ZL7gqYG5xBM949r_NOZzu9PTgsyAbZJLP6_7Q1sEYCMgwJyD9lXOjw==&ch=dh9i3Glc65q4vAdmekzXD2CNELLuyTfbFa3bnevT50E32sv_btEA5g==)

The Senate Majority has been there for my father since day 1. Without them, the MAGA agenda would have been endlessly delayed and derailed by Schumer, Pelosi, and the liberal resistance.

Now, they are under attack. False smears and attack ads are filling the airwaves around the country. Meeting these important goals are the only way we can fight back. [**There is no time to waste. body:
I got into this race because I know change is possible. As a state senator in Topeka, I’ve seen how tough and ugly our politics can be -- but I also know Kansans want leaders who can move past the partisan bickering to get real results for them and their families.

|
---

| | Team, We’re facing a big end-of-month fundraising deadline this week and I wanted to take a moment to tell you why this deadline is so important. Something big is happening in Kansas. The latest polling shows us two points ahead of our likely Republican opponent, Kris Kobach. The _National Journal_ named Kansas one of the top ten Senate seats most likely to flip this year. The generosity and enthusiasm of supporters like you has made our momentum possible. But we’ve still got a long, uphill road until November and the only way we can flip this seat is by continuing to prove we can beat the odds. name: Luke Hilgemann, Hunter Nation
subject: Sign the petition to protect public lands for hunters
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001baha4lN0OewDF0bOizXuNrC305ft_pZ-tn1VySDmohoR0j-svoRfDg-yT9XDcRMubnwwaM3m5uf1aygkMcnaRFLkFjfwU_1zJkHGhJooywdxVFGvvwHrYmXpj7jsBjlpWdXmrRNGdMkSj-qWIcEXFbkxyY-4GfpaUNtA4k2IahMyu96pgaURKA2yvAfmlGcx1Iqh9wB0GDE=&c=3twqF4AXxSE7ZGHYAearWQVfAfg6V1gDI-bTehoYeiOf8mmfSy9SMw==&ch=cxJBgjwdCgfHGsJo6im6eviRnV7Wf8ZVg90xZJvR0p9hJ--01tzSzQ==) Dear Friend, In the midst of this global pandemic, I hope this email finds you and your family well. While our fellow citizens are doing what they can to protect one another by practicing social distancing, state governments are overreaching when it comes to our fundamental rights. In San Jose, California, a shelter-in-place was ordered. Many gun dealers across the Bay Area opted to stay open -- and rightly so. **Ultimately, law enforcement ordered gun shops to close, declaring that guns aren't an _essential_ item.** _In Illinois, matters are even worse. The state has closed all parks, fish and wildlife areas, recreational areas, and historic sites!_ **[State governments are using this health crisis to take away our rights -- often in ways that would make no difference in the fight against this virus -- which is why I'm speeding you this email to ask for your signature on the National Petition to Stand up for Hunting Rights!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001baha4lN0OewDF0bOizXuNrC305ft_pZ-tn1VySDmohoR0j-svoRfDg-yT9XDcRMubnwwaM3m5uf1aygkMcnaRFLkFjfwU_1zJkHGhJooywdxVFGvvwHrYmXpj7jsBjlpWdXmrRNGdMkSj-qWIcEXFbkxyY-4GfpaUNtA4k2IahMyu96pgaURKA2yvAfmlGcx1Iqh9wB0GDE=&c=3twqF4AXxSE7ZGHYAearWQVfAfg6V1gDI-bTehoYeiOf8mmfSy9SMw==&ch=cxJBgjwdCgfHGsJo6im6eviRnV7Wf8ZVg90xZJvR0p9hJ--01tzSzQ==)** [**Sign the Petition**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001baha4lN0OewDF0bOizXuNrC305ft_pZ-tn1VySDmohoR0j-svoRfDg-yT9XDcRMubnwwaM3m5uf1aygkMcnaRFLkFjfwU_1zJkHGhJooywdxVFGvvwHrYmXpj7jsBjlpWdXmrRNGdMkSj-qWIcEXFbkxyY-4GfpaUNtA4k2IahMyu96pgaURKA2yvAfmlGcx1Iqh9wB0GDE=&c=3twqF4AXxSE7ZGHYAearWQVfAfg6V1gDI-bTehoYeiOf8mmfSy9SMw==&ch=cxJBgjwdCgfHGsJo6im6eviRnV7Wf8ZVg90xZJvR0p9hJ--01tzSzQ==) The problem in many states is that politicians are out-of-touch. It's my best guess that many folks who are making these decisions -- that guns are non-essential and that public hunting lands should be closed -- don't spend much time with either. Illinois shutting down access to the outdoors during a global pandemic is ludicrous. There aren't large crowds gathering in small spaces on public lands in the midwest! More importantly, if the response to this virus eventually threatens our food supply, access to guns and hunting lands will quickly become a matter of life and death for many Americans. _**But anti-hunting radicals and their political allies are using fear and anxiety to force their big government agenda on us during a vulnerable time. We must fight back for our constitutional rights!**_ **[Will you help stand up for the rights of hunters across our nation by signing this national petition today?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001baha4lN0OewDF0bOizXuNrC305ft_pZ-tn1VySDmohoR0j-svoRfDg-yT9XDcRMubnwwaM3m5uf1aygkMcnaRFLkFjfwU_1zJkHGhJooywdxVFGvvwHrYmXpj7jsBjlpWdXmrRNGdMkSj-qWIcEXFbkxyY-4GfpaUNtA4k2IahMyu96pgaURKA2yvAfmlGcx1Iqh9wB0GDE=&c=3twqF4AXxSE7ZGHYAearWQVfAfg6V1gDI-bTehoYeiOf8mmfSy9SMw==&ch=cxJBgjwdCgfHGsJo6im6eviRnV7Wf8ZVg90xZJvR0p9hJ--01tzSzQ==)** As hunters and Americans who believe in the Constitution, if we unite as one large Hunter Nation we will become a powerful voice. **It's critical that we continue raising our voices -- particularly when big government is working so hard to rip away our freedoms.** Unfortunately, the rights of hunters are under attack by those who want to destroy our way of life and don't understand why we need guns or access to public hunting land. These are the same people who want to take our guns, mock our faith in God, open our borders, claim the government can save us all, and destroy the moral fabric of America. Well, as proud American hunters -- we cannot let that happen! **[Please help me fight back today. All you have to do is click here to sign the national petition.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001baha4lN0OewDF0bOizXuNrC305ft_pZ-tn1VySDmohoR0j-svoRfDg-yT9XDcRMubnwwaM3m5uf1aygkMcnaRFLkFjfwU_1zJkHGhJooywdxVFGvvwHrYmXpj7jsBjlpWdXmrRNGdMkSj-qWIcEXFbkxyY-4GfpaUNtA4k2IahMyu96pgaURKA2yvAfmlGcx1Iqh9wB0GDE=&c=3twqF4AXxSE7ZGHYAearWQVfAfg6V1gDI-bTehoYeiOf8mmfSy9SMw==&ch=cxJBgjwdCgfHGsJo6im6eviRnV7Wf8ZVg90xZJvR0p9hJ--01tzSzQ==)** [**Sign the Petition**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001baha4lN0OewDF0bOizXuNrC305ft_pZ-tn1VySDmohoR0j-svoRfDg-yT9XDcRMubnwwaM3m5uf1aygkMcnaRFLkFjfwU_1zJkHGhJooywdxVFGvvwHrYmXpj7jsBjlpWdXmrRNGdMkSj-qWIcEXFbkxyY-4GfpaUNtA4k2IahMyu96pgaURKA2yvAfmlGcx1Iqh9wB0GDE=&c=3twqF4AXxSE7ZGHYAearWQVfAfg6V1gDI-bTehoYeiOf8mmfSy9SMw==&ch=cxJBgjwdCgfHGsJo6im6eviRnV7Wf8ZVg90xZJvR0p9hJ--01tzSzQ==) Extremist politicians need to be reminded that closing gun stores and shutting down hunting lands will do nothing to stop or slow the spread of the coronavirus. All it will do is infringe on our freedoms and endanger millions of Americans during an uncertain time. **When united together, we are a strong and powerful army defending the values that we hold dear.** Our views matter, and we're going to make sure that every state attempting to restrict our way of life hears from Hunter Nation. **[Help us fight back for the rights of all hunters -- and all Americans -- with your signature today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001baha4lN0OewDF0bOizXuNrC305ft_pZ-tn1VySDmohoR0j-svoRfDg-yT9XDcRMubnwwaM3m5uf1aygkMcnaRFLkFjfwU_1zJkHGhJooywdxVFGvvwHrYmXpj7jsBjlpWdXmrRNGdMkSj-qWIcEXFbkxyY-4GfpaUNtA4k2IahMyu96pgaURKA2yvAfmlGcx1Iqh9wB0GDE=&c=3twqF4AXxSE7ZGHYAearWQVfAfg6V1gDI-bTehoYeiOf8mmfSy9SMw==&ch=cxJBgjwdCgfHGsJo6im6eviRnV7Wf8ZVg90xZJvR0p9hJ--01tzSzQ==)** God bless you, and God bless America.
Luke Luke Hilgemann CEO Hunter Nation No purchase necessary. Go to [www.hunternation.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001baha4lN0OewDF0bOizXuNrC305ft_pZ-tn1VySDmohoR0j-svoRfDg-yT9XDcRMuwX125DpEvjnrvUs2WhFc3Ljyr-X7tPRoe_4Dn90df9mAr_Cb5bK3EfYNU0WyfFIlEjoWBJXQDSxUlvYNeD_zdA==&c=3twqF4AXxSE7ZGHYAearWQVfAfg6V1gDI-bTehoYeiOf8mmfSy9SMw==&ch=cxJBgjwdCgfHGsJo6im6eviRnV7Wf8ZVg90xZJvR0p9hJ--01tzSzQ==) for official rules and more information.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Former News Exec: The ‘Liberal Leaning’ Media Has Passed Its Tipping Point
body:
"News organizations that claim to be neutral have long been creeping leftward, and their loathing of Mr. Trump has accelerated the pace." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90d2a9b5f1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# Former News Exec: The ‘Liberal Leaning’ Media Has Passed Its Tipping Point

“News organizations that claim to be neutral have long been creeping leftward, and their loathing of Mr. Trump has accelerated the pace. The news media is catching up with the liberalism of the professoriate, the entertainment industry, upscale magazines and the literary world,” former CBS News President Van Gordon Sauter writes in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“There’s probably no way to seal the gap between the media and a large segment of the public. The media likes what it is doing. Admires it. Celebrates it. There is no personal, professional or financial reason to change. If anything, the gap will expand. Ultimately, the media finds the ‘deplorables’ deplorable.”

[Click here to read more. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23d8635f57&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Among the fallen, most were laid to rest in the land they loved, others lie beneath white crosses in military cemeteries around the world, and others’ final resting place is known only to God,” Vice President Mike Pence wrote in honor of Memorial Day. “To all of them, we owe a debt of gratitude we can never repay, and this year especially, we feel the profound gratitude to our heroic fallen and their families.” Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5ef503651&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “In calling on governors Friday to allow houses of worship to reopen starting this weekend, President Trump publicly recognized a fact that has been true since the founding of our nation: in America, houses of worship are essential,” Rev. Samuel Rodriguez writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=68a04b371b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The state lockdowns are starting to ease and the U.S. economy should slowly begin to recover. But it’s worth noting that the states opening most slowly are big states run by Democrats that represent something like a third of the U.S. economy. This means a slower recovery for those states and the U.S.,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23bdbb0795&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1ab6693ac8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ae060ad81&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ff14e13ded)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
Thanks to Senate Republicans like Cory Gardner, we've confirmed two pro-Constitution Supreme Court Justices Kavanaugh and, Colorado native, Gorsuch; over 200 federal judges; passed historic tax cuts; secured increased funding for our military and veterans; and the list goes on!

Hey, Friend, its Don Jr. I'm reaching out to you today to let you know about Cory Gardner's fight to help my father keep his Republican Senate Majority this November.

Here's the situation: since he didn't even come close to securing the Democratic nomination to go up against my father this November, failed leftwing presidential candidate John Hickenlooper has now reallocated his campaign war chest to run for Senate in Colorado against Cory.

But despite his lackluster performance on the national stage, Hickenlooper is pulling in big fundraising numbers from radical leftwing special interests, thanks to official endorsements from Schumer, Biden, and many other National Democrats.

**_We must stay ahead, Friend. Cory's fight is far from over. Without your help, we could lose this seat, and possibly our Republican Senate Majority._**

name: Jake C.
subject: A quick update from the field
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ohJWaKDG7pJ0yb0geUgBrBj5Z7UDEZKrVq_pwruFGbQ=/a9yobaXD51vZJgHmxfxm-8VBecMgJDIgcQOe6MMge9g=)

Peter,

With less than one month to go until Primary Day on Tuesday, June 23rd, all of us here on Team Bunkeddeko are working round-the-clock to reach as many voters as possible and grow Adem's support across Brooklyn! And today, I wanted to send around a quick field update to let you know where things stand:

So far, our team has made over 14,000 calls, sent over 12,000 texts, and welcomed hundreds of volunteers to join in our efforts. Every single day, we're talking with voters who are looking for bold leadership and are excited to fill out their ballots for Adem. We've heard things like "I like Adem! He seems honest and sincere, really just a down to earth kind of guy. It would be nice to have a congressperson like him," and "If he supports the Green New Deal agenda, I'm in!"

As someone who's on the phones speaking with voters each day, I can feel the energy and enthusiasm for Adem growing as we near the election -- and as registered Democrats begin to receive and fill out their mail-in ballots over the coming days and weeks, we'll need to ramp up our efforts even more. **[Will you give $200, $100, or $50 today to ensure that we have the resources we need to reach every voter and win this election?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ohJWaKDG7pJ0yb0geUgBrBj5Z7UDEZKrVq_pwruFGbQ=/9PVQo-y1Ia2bQ5jamYmYOWRLcGa0ch4tz84TUrnNhaE=)**

Best,
Jake C.

* * *

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. = If you’d like to volunteer, If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to . PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States

name: John Cornyn
subject: RADICALS!
body:
Friend, The past month has shown me two things about what we are up against.
First, when Americans needed relief, Nancy Pelosi and her Democrats tried to pass a multi-trillion dollar bill jam-packed with their radical agenda.
They do not care about anything but themselves.
Second, they will do anything to spread that liberal agenda all across the country. Just this month, even Elizabeth Warren and Maxine Waters got involved in our race right here in Texas!
They want to bring it all here: handouts for illegal immigrants, on-demand abortions, even the Green New Deal.
Thankfully, this month I've also heard from hundreds of Texans like you who have pledged their commitment to KEEPING TEXAS RED at all costs.
**[I'm hoping that today, Friend, you'll join them by chipping in anything you can to my END OF MONTH FUND.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Lm_mAG7ENk5c7MeQiYt4TWtlEY0eXwSvPzWYGR492QkwqoeTgUu3XRZQUMeS0k3KA_eetvNRXM3OshtrgqW2hNxDE54s5_3g4YuZuGQNztL0KV3PDhDD4n925CdM78lzGzkCzxR_Ur2wF5Kh7SJcoGWXpM2Uq2eGTLFvw9gtFLh1nq4DqCIHSsdAmS9l0OWxOrgZQkSKykt-j8O2CAb2IxaiRf9ByUDXAObEEqZBoXxB7A8-560mNLoB-57l101VEF-oCL4Dwb4CRcOCf4NjYma_oDVIfZQb46FB53WcZaJ-2aCY8UHSeEWBWs7d0oqGzjK-Jl14uVbdO5Ohjs9J2A==&c=cO8bHtvYdud6S96YkW_9vnFzIKU6SaoZqTcc3s7eBAI8nDVLTonRhw==&ch=6-k5X4mVE4n8vVV_drBzdZcWCElL7RFlSPmb8f7rg6fek1O4qPe-PQ==)** **May Fundraising Deadline** End of month goal: **SHORT** [**KEEP TEXAS RED**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Lm_mAG7ENk5c7MeQiYt4TWtlEY0eXwSvPzWYGR492QkwqoeTgUu3XRZQUMeS0k3KA_eetvNRXM3OshtrgqW2hNxDE54s5_3g4YuZuGQNztL0KV3PDhDD4n925CdM78lzGzkCzxR_Ur2wF5Kh7SJcoGWXpM2Uq2eGTLFvw9gtFLh1nq4DqCIHSsdAmS9l0OWxOrgZQkSKykt-j8O2CAb2IxaiRf9ByUDXAObEEqZBoXxB7A8-560mNLoB-57l101VEF-oCL4Dwb4CRcOCf4NjYma_oDVIfZQb46FB53WcZaJ-2aCY8UHSeEWBWs7d0oqGzjK-Jl14uVaSHLwE_4U_cQ==&c=cO8bHtvYdud6S96YkW_9vnFzIKU6SaoZqTcc3s7eBAI8nDVLTonRhw==&ch=6-k5X4mVE4n8vVV_drBzdZcWCElL7RFlSPmb8f7rg6fek1O4qPe-PQ==) This month, this entire fund will be dedicated to combating the damage done by the likes of ELIZABETH WARREN and BETO O'ROURKE, who both rallied up their supporters against me in the last month.
You have my word that every dollar raised from this email will go towards keeping their extreme agenda OUT of your neighborhood.

So Friend, if you are serious about defending our values so that one day our children and grandchildren can experience the same freedom we do today.

On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? ### Rep. Waymaster Drops Out!
---
|
---
| Friend,

Rep. Troy Waymaster has dropped out of the race for the**First Congressional District.**

We are now running against one other candidate to be the **Republican nominee for Kansas’ Big First district**. We are getting closer to the **August 4th primary** and we need your help to deliver our **conservative message** across the Big First district.

With this breaking news, we need your help to deliver our message. [Would you be willing to make a generous contribution today?](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=dcbabfa653&e=a9d1410029) Any amount would help send out mailers, buy 4x8 signs, or get our message on the TV and radio.

**Thank you for your support**. I look forward to seeing you soon.

All my best,

Tracey

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: End of an Era
body:
Thank you for being a part of this campaign. Unfortunately, we are suspending it. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2949135543c1/end-of-an-era?e=c56804a14d)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hey everyone,

By now you’ve probably heard that we are suspending our campaign for Congress. This last Sunday following the CD6 convention, Tawnja Zahradka won the DFL nomination, and I have always been direct about my willingness to abide by the endorsement.

Not to be melodramatic, but this is a bit of an end of an era for me. I’ve been campaigning since I separated from the Air Force in 2017, and as we close up shop, I really do feel like I’m losing a piece of myself. The campaign was such a massive part of my life, and it’s surreal for it to end.

I don’t want anyone to worry about me, though. The campaign has also been a heavy weight I carried with me everywhere I went. It was all encompassing. I was proud to bear the burden, though, because I was doing it for all of you. It always felt right, and I will always look back on these years with great pride and as a source of inspiration for future endeavors. Now I have the chance to stop for a second, take inventory, and press forward once again in a different direction.

I’ll continue working on my Biochemistry and Molecular Biology degree. Science is my other great passion in life, so I’ll be giving that the focus it deserves. Denise and I are also trying to start our family. Perhaps it’s best that we won’t have two life-altering events going on in our lives at the same time, right? I will also continue posting and sharing my opinions through various media. I may not have received the DFL endorsement, but I’m no less opinionated, verbose, or passionate because of it.

I want to thank all of you again for everything you’ve done for this campaign and for me. Most of you on this email list are donors. That makes this list a valuable commodity in the political world, and strangely enough, it belongs to me personally now. I won’t sell it. I’ve always been a bit disgusted by the act of selling personal information, and now that I have the opportunity to benefit from such an act, I won’t take it. I think that’s the respectful thing to do for all of you that have been so kind and generous to me. Also, your inboxes are probably full enough as is.

However, I will keep this list and continue to expand it. I cannot say with any certainty exactly what our new “This is Ian Todd” brand that we’ve been switching campaign social media accounts into will be, but I will use this email list to tell you about it as we slowly figure it out. Now, I understand everyone on this list signed up to learn about, follow, and/or support a candidate for political office and not to hear from some guy who does political podcasts or what-have-you. If you choose to unsubscribe (bottom of every email), I completely understand. However, I will use this list if I run again, and while that may be a while from now, I’d love to still have all of you here for that.

Once again, thank you for everything. I’ve been blown away by how passionate you all are about the issues that matter to you. I showed up for another run against Emmer this time because of that passion and conviction, and I know it hasn’t gone anywhere. Keep up the fight! It will always be worth the struggle.

Your friend,
Ian Todd
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Call to Action: We want a second opinion & more!
body:
| |
---
It’s inspiring to see so many of our fellow Americans resisting actual tyranny, especially this week, as we commemorate those Americans who paid the ultimate price to protect and defend freedom. From churches announcing that they’re not going to follow discriminatory restrictions any longer, to the hair stylists and barbers making their stand on the lawn of the Michigan state capitol, Americans are pushing back!
**SIGN OUR PETITIONS**
**[Sign our Second Opinion petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTQ3LWE5OGEzMDJmMjljODQ1ODM5YjliZjA4YjM2ZTEyM2Ux%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi8_bWlkPTQyMDg3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=s2b6xP48dcgeAjou-unRjA)** demanding a second opinion on the virus, on the lockdowns, on all of it. We do not consent to being oppressed by a few bureaucrats and so-called “experts.” This is America, after all.

[**Sign our Balance the Pain petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTQ3LWE5OGEzMDJmMjljODQ1ODM5YjliZjA4YjM2ZTEyM2Ux%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvYmFsYW5jZXBhaW4_bWlkPTQyMDg3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=foNhwcX-kJxiRYAFLRHS6w) urging President Trump to support legislation to cut the pay of government employees by 20% during this crisis, so that bureaucrats and elected officials are not insulated from the consequences of the decisions they are forcing on everyone else.
|
---
**FILL OUT OUR SURVEY**
**[Fill out this survey](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTQ3LWE5OGEzMDJmMjljODQ1ODM5YjliZjA4YjM2ZTEyM2Ux%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC8xb3lFdUU2Skc3dGp0S0UtTVRlVktqUExJM2JtMDZ6Y0o4MzFFUk1mRnpNZy9lZGl0P21pZD00MjA4NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=LwFsGc9H1_FPCQKRbkCeAw) if you haven’t yet, about good stories and successes that are happening in your area.** Or, if you filled it out once, but have a new success story, fill it out again. If you are a business owner that has recently been able to reopen, or you are an employee that has been able to go back to work, or you are a customer that has been able to shop or dine somewhere, we need your stories!
|
---
**KEEP CALLING YOUR SENATORS**
Senate Republicans are going to need a lot of support to stand firm against state bailouts. The media is going to go all out to pressure Republican Senators to cave to Nancy Pelosi’s demands. **They must hear from their constituents to stand firm. * **No state bailouts**
* **YES on a payroll tax holiday**

|

We’ve been working to help Dr. Simone Gold launch her organization and project, [“A Doctor a Day.”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTQ3LWE5OGEzMDJmMjljODQ1ODM5YjliZjA4YjM2ZTEyM2Ux%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWRvY3RvcmFkYXkuY29tLz9taWQ9NDIwODcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=adNbe6ivMRBi6rM2TVlAPQ) She will interview a new doctor every day to promote the fact that there is not just one opinion among America’s one million licensed physicians. **Please share[this website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTQ3LWE5OGEzMDJmMjljODQ1ODM5YjliZjA4YjM2ZTEyM2Ux%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWRvY3RvcmFkYXkuY29tLz9taWQ9NDIwODcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=1eVrlmUCDQHO96EpVpYsOg) and the videos on social media and email it to your networks.**

subject: anti-Trump, liberal money in Kansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
😠 Steve Watkins donors are people who actively give to Planned Parenthood, Pelosi, The Kansas Democratic Party, the DCCC, Obama, Hillary, and Biden.

Patriot,

After it was reported that Steve Watkins only had 18 donors that he represents in Kansas, we started to research who was contributing to his campaign nationally.
Who actually is donating to Steve's campaign? The answer is shocking and disappointing.

Some of Congressman Steve Watkins' largest campaign contributors are from out of state liberals that openly give to liberals, pro-abortion groups, and anti-Trump candidates. Among the list of Steve Watkins donors are people who actively give to Planned Parenthood, Nancy Pelosi, The Kansas Democratic Party, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee, Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton, and Joe Biden.
https://www.jakelaturner.com/watkins-liberal-donors
Don't believe us? The FEC requires candidates to report this publicly, so you can see it for yourself:
Donor 1 (https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/individual-contributions/?data_type=processed&contributor_name=anita+wien&contributor_city=new+york&two_year_transaction_period=2012&two_year_transaction_period=2014&two_year_transaction_period=2016&two_year_transaction_period=2018&two_year_transaction_period=2020&min_date=01%2F01%2F2011&max_date=12%2F31%2F2020) - Donor 2 (https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/individual-contributions/?data_type=processed&contributor_name=robert+evans&contributor_city=stamford&two_year_transaction_period=2012&two_year_transaction_period=2014&two_year_transaction_period=2016&two_year_transaction_period=2018&two_year_transaction_period=2020&min_date=01%2F01%2F2011&max_date=12%2F31%2F2020) - Donor 3
(https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/individual-contributions/?data_type=processed&contributor_name=jonathan+davis&contributor_zip=02467&two_year_transaction_period=2012&two_year_transaction_period=2014&two_year_transaction_period=2016&two_year_transaction_period=2018&two_year_transaction_period=2020&min_date=01%2F01%2F2011&max_date=12%2F31%2F2020) - Donor 4 (https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/individual-contributions/?data_type=processed&contributor_name=peter+malkin&two_year_transaction_period=2012&two_year_transaction_period=2014&two_year_transaction_period=2016&two_year_transaction_period=2018&two_year_transaction_period=2020&min_date=01%2F01%2F2011&max_date=12%2F31%2F2020) - Donor 5
(https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/individual-contributions/?data_type=processed&contributor_name=george+walker&contributor_city=new+york&two_year_transaction_period=2020&two_year_transaction_period=2018&two_year_transaction_period=2016&two_year_transaction_period=2014&two_year_transaction_period=2012&min_date=01%2F01%2F2011&max_date=12%2F31%2F2020) - Donor 6 (https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/individual-contributions/?data_type=processed&contributor_name=christy+walton&two_year_transaction_period=2020&two_year_transaction_period=2018&two_year_transaction_period=2016&two_year_transaction_period=2014&two_year_transaction_period=2012&min_date=01%2F01%2F2011&max_date=12%2F31%2F2020) - Donor 7
(https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/individual-contributions/?data_type=processed&contributor_name=thomas+gart&two_year_transaction_period=2020&two_year_transaction_period=2018&two_year_transaction_period=2016&two_year_transaction_period=2014&two_year_transaction_period=2012&min_date=01%2F01%2F2011&max_date=12%2F31%2F2020) - Donor 8 (https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/individual-contributions/?data_type=processed&contributor_name=aimee+feuser&two_year_transaction_period=2020&two_year_transaction_period=2018&two_year_transaction_period=2016&two_year_transaction_period=2014&two_year_transaction_period=2012&min_date=01%2F01%2F2011&max_date=12%2F31%2F2020) - Donor 9 (https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/individual-contributions/?data_type=processed&contributor_name=Dan+feuser&two_year_transaction_period=2020&two_year_transaction_period=2018&two_year_transaction_period=2016&two_year_transaction_period=2014&two_year_transaction_period=2012&min_date=01%2F01%2F2011&max_date=12%2F31%2F2020) - Donor 10
(https://www.fec.gov/data/receipts/individual-contributions/?data_type=processed&contributor_name=raymond+chambers&two_year_transaction_period=2020&two_year_transaction_period=2018&two_year_transaction_period=2016&two_year_transaction_period=2014&two_year_transaction_period=2012&min_date=01%2F01%2F2011&max_date=12%2F31%2F2020)

These ten donors alone have given over $23,000 to Steve Watkins and they have given over $1 MILLION to anti-Trump liberals.

This is in a word, unacceptable. How can someone who pretends to be a conservative, accept funds from those who are actively working against our cause EVERY. SINGLE. DAY? Our Kansas congressman, who ran as a Republican and promised to uphold the values of those who elected him to that office, and yet here he is accepting this dirty, liberal, out of state money. Kansas does not need money from the swamp.

Join us today by signing our petition insisting that Congressman Watkins give these campaign contributions back to the liberal parties who are funneling money into his campaign.
Sign Petition for Steve Watkins to Give Back the $$! (https://www.jakelaturner.com/watkins-liberal-donors)
It is offensive to Republicans that one of their own party would accept donations from people who have given millions of dollars to candidates who are working against our cause every single day.
Yours in the fight!

Team LaTurner
Help us Drain the Swamp (https://secure.anedot.com/laturner/donate-sd)

name: Our Revolution
subject: [Important] take our DCCC Blacklist Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| [SURVEY]: How can we fight the establishment's blacklist? Team,

Even though COVID-19 has validated every major progressive policy proposal that our movement is fighting for, **the corporate wing of the Democratic party continues to blacklist organizations that dare to work with progressive candidates in House or Senate primaries against incumbent Democrats.**

The Democratic establishment is terrified that more candidates who believe in a Green New Deal, getting big money out of politics, and Medicare for All will join Alexandira Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib in Congress. That's what their blacklist is all about.

**Look, Our Revolution refuses to back down.** We've already helped progressives like Marie Newman overcome the blacklist this year to win tight races, and our members are continuing to organize at the grassroots level for progressive candidates all across the country.

[_**You are an important member of this movement. That 's why we're asking you to take our DCCC Blacklist Survey. We want your opinion on the best way to defeat corporate Democrats in primaries!**_](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/2020-05-dccc-blacklist-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-++if+consfirstname+consfirstname+you++els&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_2YR_200526_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_2YR_200526_1_1") **[Answer Here](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/2020-05-dccc-blacklist-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+Answer+Here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_2YR_200526_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_2YR_200526_1_1")** We are dead serious about our mission to get big money out of politics, restore a democracy of the people, and pass progressive legislation like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal.

COVID-19 has only widened the already disturbing levels of health and economic equality in the United States, and people will continue suffering unless we succeed in passing these policies. We will not back down against the establishment's pathetic attempts to stop voters from electing progressives who represent what's good for the American people, not multinational corporations.

**But, given the stakes, we want your opinion on the best way to take on the establishment moving forward.**

clean_body: | [SURVEY]: How can we fight the establishment's blacklist? Team, Even though COVID-19 has validated every major progressive policy proposal that our movement is fighting for, the corporate wing of the Democratic party continues to blacklist organizations that dare to work with progressive candidates in House or Senate primaries against incumbent Democrats. The Democratic establishment is terrified that more candidates who believe in a Green New Deal, getting big money out of politics, and Medicare for All will join Alexandira Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib in Congress. That's what their blacklist is all about. Look, Our Revolution refuses to back down. We've already helped progressives like Marie Newman overcome the blacklist this year to win tight races, and our members are continuing to organize at the grassroots level for progressive candidates all across the country. "" "" We are dead serious about our mission to get big money out of politics, restore a democracy of the people, and pass progressive legislation like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. COVID-19 has only widened the already disturbing levels of health and economic equality in the United States, and people will continue suffering unless we succeed in passing these policies. We will not back down against the establishment's pathetic attempts to stop voters from electing progressives who represent what's good for the American people, not multinational corporations. But, given the stakes, we want your opinion on the best way to take on the establishment moving forward. "" "" Onward, The whole team at Our Revolution HQ "" "" "" "" Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. >From city halls to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party and get big money out of politics. name: Dean Browning
subject: The Chronicles of Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller: Chapter 7: Scheller & Obama
body:
For our final segment in the Chronicles, we will discuss Lisa Scheller’s close personal relationship with Obama and his administration.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
First and foremost, I would like to thank you for taking the time to read these Chronicles.
While I know at times this Primary has gotten heated, I believe it is imperative to set the record straight and distinguish myself as the only true Pro-Trump Conservative in this race. For our final segment in the Chronicles, we will discuss Lisa Scheller's close personal relationship with Obama and his administration.
Classic Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller claims that she's against corporate handouts.
But once again, the facts say differently.
Lisa Scheller claims she opposes these million-dollar handouts; UNLESS they directly benefit her and her company.
During the Great Recession, Lisa Scheller took nearly HALF A MILLION DOLLARS of stimulus from the Obama Administration and used it to install solar panels at her privately owned company. [You can even see for yourself. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvqJEOY60X7tng4t7_Te7TdXcForiAg0Y6ug4VkGRQTTomBFjvBbPnY5jYOHFmRSoPr5zyFULwt0u79GIaVaeeU7hImL8toDHPZqj63GQI2sRCZs-6n8_rPLAEyOTAIMc7Xxj9DXgExLwV35YliJ0l6ejTwRWXZZIdyoVaKN2YB4xezFO3kZLvfWyg424k6YVnx99IT7PSStb0RwfEsOXQ6sTbXLl4ajzHjYtCfO0YM=&c=DPv3sV480KbZpcMBjHGI_qL-AA3_HLbPJ0CS54luwxds4HcPh9kKBA==&ch=XPiQIcq7uudJuwVnjQ4fpGN8b8w7JJE_f_0I8xUnvjhTW45_DnMO1Q==) [CLICK HERE TO SEE THE PROOF!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvqJEOY60X7tng4t7_Te7TdXcForiAg0Y6ug4VkGRQTTomBFjvBbPnY5jYOHFmRSoPr5zyFULwt0u79GIaVaeeU7hImL8toDHPZqj63GQI2sRCZs-6n8_rPLAEyOTAIMc7Xxj9DXgExLwV35YliJ0l6ejTwRWXZZIdyoVaKN2YB4xezFO3kZLvfWyg424k6YVnx99IT7PSStb0RwfEsOXQ6sTbXLl4ajzHjYtCfO0YM=&c=DPv3sV480KbZpcMBjHGI_qL-AA3_HLbPJ0CS54luwxds4HcPh9kKBA==&ch=XPiQIcq7uudJuwVnjQ4fpGN8b8w7JJE_f_0I8xUnvjhTW45_DnMO1Q==)
Her company took this money with absolutely ZERO oversight.
It's possible that Lisa Scheller simply used Obama's money as a nice little "Christmas Bonus."
Or maybe, she's been using Obama's money to fund her political campaigns? I'm sure that is why she has no problem writing her campaign a check for around $600,000!!
So when Lisa Scheller says she believe one thing, she usually acts on the exact opposite. Particularly if it involves stealing from the American taxpayers!
, I cannot fight Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller and her Obama Administration money on my own. I need your support now, before it is too late.
I encourage you to make a donation of $100, $50, or even just $10 to my campaign right now!!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvqJEOY60X7tng4t7_Te7TdXcForiAg0Y6ug4VkGRQTTomBFjvBbPllSmnB5n2H2F83PJqoX_Hq1nBj37r2MWf1szhprB_UMEyzBjYpPdM1P-NIYblRI44keKwSA3STv0kf0-WyP4zLKRqI5FBiKD7Whp5knOB98wXWlKP5p_wnuHQnJ9wa9tA==&c=DPv3sV480KbZpcMBjHGI_qL-AA3_HLbPJ0CS54luwxds4HcPh9kKBA==&ch=XPiQIcq7uudJuwVnjQ4fpGN8b8w7JJE_f_0I8xUnvjhTW45_DnMO1Q==)
---
| Here is what I know about Lisa Scheller:
She likes to hire expensive Harrisburg and D.C. consultants to do her dirty work.
She is Pro-Abortion.
She is Anti-Trump.
She is Pro-Sanctuary City.
She is Pro-Tax Increases.
She is Against Mental Health Funding.
She loves Barack Obama and the money he gave her!
So, while Lisa Scheller may claim one thing, she will always act the other way. Just like all of the other current RINO's in office.
There is only one true Pro-Trump Conservative out there, and that is me.
The truth is, Lehigh Valley does not need another Washington Establishment politician trying to run things from their cozy corner office in D.C.
Together, we can restore Lehigh Valley and bring back Conservative values that built this great country.
I am here to work for you. I am here to work for the people of Pennsylvania's 7th district. And most importantly, I am here to serve the best interests of the United States of America.
Election Day is coming soon, and I hope you will support me in this Primary.
I urge you to make a small donation to my campaign so I can continue fighting for these next couple of weeks.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvqJEOY60X7tng4t7_Te7TdXcForiAg0Y6ug4VkGRQTTomBFjvBbPllSmnB5n2H2F83PJqoX_Hq1nBj37r2MWf1szhprB_UMEyzBjYpPdM1P-NIYblRI44keKwSA3STv0kf0-WyP4zLKRqI5FBiKD7Whp5knOB98wXWlKP5p_wnuHQnJ9wa9tA==&c=DPv3sV480KbZpcMBjHGI_qL-AA3_HLbPJ0CS54luwxds4HcPh9kKBA==&ch=XPiQIcq7uudJuwVnjQ4fpGN8b8w7JJE_f_0I8xUnvjhTW45_DnMO1Q==)
---
| I look forward to serving you, and your family's interests in the United States Congress.
For Liberty,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ Have you heard that Lisa Scheller's company took nearly half a million dollars from the Obama Administration?
[You can even see for yourself. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvqJEOY60X7tng4t7_Te7TdXcForiAg0Y6ug4VkGRQTTomBFjvBbPnY5jYOHFmRSoPr5zyFULwt0u79GIaVaeeU7hImL8toDHPZqj63GQI2sRCZs-6n8_rPLAEyOTAIMc7Xxj9DXgExLwV35YliJ0l6ejTwRWXZZIdyoVaKN2YB4xezFO3kZLvfWyg424k6YVnx99IT7PSStb0RwfEsOXQ6sTbXLl4ajzHjYtCfO0YM=&c=DPv3sV480KbZpcMBjHGI_qL-AA3_HLbPJ0CS54luwxds4HcPh9kKBA==&ch=XPiQIcq7uudJuwVnjQ4fpGN8b8w7JJE_f_0I8xUnvjhTW45_DnMO1Q==) [CLICK HERE TO SEE THE PROOF!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zvqJEOY60X7tng4t7_Te7TdXcForiAg0Y6ug4VkGRQTTomBFjvBbPnY5jYOHFmRSoPr5zyFULwt0u79GIaVaeeU7hImL8toDHPZqj63GQI2sRCZs-6n8_rPLAEyOTAIMc7Xxj9DXgExLwV35YliJ0l6ejTwRWXZZIdyoVaKN2YB4xezFO3kZLvfWyg424k6YVnx99IT7PSStb0RwfEsOXQ6sTbXLl4ajzHjYtCfO0YM=&c=DPv3sV480KbZpcMBjHGI_qL-AA3_HLbPJ0CS54luwxds4HcPh9kKBA==&ch=XPiQIcq7uudJuwVnjQ4fpGN8b8w7JJE_f_0I8xUnvjhTW45_DnMO1Q==)
We need to stop Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller today!
Will you donate $100, $50, or even just $10 today so I can work with President Trump in Keeping America Great?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christianna=20Dyer?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/21c3138758a3/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, Dani for Illinois volunteers! I wanted to introduce myself - my name is Christianna, and I am the newest Organizer with #TeamDani. I am so excited for the chance to meet all of you, so please don’t hesitate to reach out. I’m looking forward to getting to work with this amazing team through Election Day. Check out the incredible work you put in last week!
* You were able to reach out to over **4,651** in the 16th District on the phone this week! That is more people than fit in the Rosemont Theatre in Chicago!
* A huge shoutout to our MVP for this week:**Larry D** for working on his third set of postcards - that is over 300 sent! You can check out his fancy artwork on our Instagram, @daniforillinois.
* We sent out more than **400 postcards** to volunteer writers all throughout the District this week to engage voters and, of course, #SaveUSPS!
* We held a super exciting **Young Dems Zoom House Party** on Friday. It was incredible to see so much passion from the future of the American Democratic party! With their energy, and yours, I know we can flip this seat for the people of IL16.

A few reminders:
* If you are interested in hosting a Virtual House Party for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, we just need you to invite your friends and pour yourself your happy hour drink of choice!
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking, **CALL YOUR FRIENDS!** Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask!

**Volunteer Voice! ** The guest columnist this week is... Mary C! I _do often add information on Dani's educational, employment, and political background because I think they're very impressive and relevant for a future Congresswoman. Head of the Democratic Party for LaSalle County, oh my! _
Christianna Dyer

I am so excited for the chance to meet all of you, so please don’t hesitate to reach out. I’m looking forward to getting to work with this amazing team through Election Day. Check out the incredible work you put in last week! You were able to reach out to over 4,651 in the 16th District on the phone this week! That is more people than fit in the Rosemont Theatre in Chicago! A huge shoutout to our MVP for this week:Larry D for working on his third set of postcards - that is over 300 sent! You can check out his fancy artwork on our Instagram, @daniforillinois. We sent out more than 400 postcards to volunteer writers all throughout the District this week to engage voters and, of course, #SaveUSPS! We held a super exciting Young Dems Zoom House Party on Friday. It was incredible to see so much passion from the future of the American Democratic party! With their energy, and yours, I know we can flip this seat for the people of IL16. A few reminders: If you are interested in hosting a Virtual House Party for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com. We will walk you through it, we just need you to invite your friends and pour yourself your happy hour drink of choice! While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking, CALL YOUR FRIENDS! Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask! Volunteer Voice! The guest columnist this week is... Mary C! I do often add information on Dani's educational, employment, and political background because I think they're very impressive and relevant for a future Congresswoman. Head of the Democratic Party for LaSalle County, oh my! Christianna Dyer | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Dani for Illinois | | Our mailing address is: Dani for Illinois PO Box 1671 LaSalle, IL 61301 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Charlie Blaettler
subject: Four weeks left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
It’s hard to believe, but we are now exactly four weeks from Election Day. All of the hard work we’ve done over the last 10 months come down to these next few weeks. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3QA/ni0YAA/t.323/gOUpLn4HQ6CtNjZpJdlQlA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKwBtE4wTPxNMFBzK0q1NVJYF1kMIGmxaq5BYZANcx5Iv7xPaxuwmWf24P4OcbB2ynNo1jc4Yfo-2F1fm0HzchPMD3mocgEL-2FssyvqtX4m28Tn2BlLp-2FcBLQjqtgqPVfOJAC8T-2FVYXH5ZYgRU6gEXP3QrfInHD7j9KWAkfffVzs4b0lCY5OHGAhoqCuFKn8wvj-2FYCIBmbUl0m7yY8UCEhnM-2FBKlPYvQ6To65Jz9-2F2n6x-2BE0MIs97QlK5mioyjEf4Fv4yUulCVKGkVH1DfcirSC4Hg/-z7I) Friend, **** **** **** It’s hard to believe, but we are now **_exactly four weeks from Election Day_**.
All of the hard work we’ve done over the last 10 months come down to these next few weeks.
Voters have started receiving mail from us, we’re making more than 30,000 calls a week, and our first ad goes up on TV **_tomorrow_**.
This is it. We’re in crunch time. We are so close to the finish line, but there’s still a lot of work to be done. Right now, **_we are about $150,000 away from hitting our budget_**.
If we don’t hit our budget, we will have to cut mail pieces and scale back our TV ad buys. We can’t afford to let up right now. **_[We need your help. Will you make a donation right now to help us win?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3QA/ni0YAA/t.323/gOUpLn4HQ6CtNjZpJdlQlA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKwBtE4wTPxNMFBzK0q1NVJYF1kMIGmxaq5BYZANcx5IkYVlfWrLULOgVTQ8cOx0QPFjvGrli2Q0DYMt7rTcYUUOmAcASXYRnRGMH2d97Ukrbn3-2FBvq1yp3x7-2BYqZOVKkkdo4ZVIg9ij0CwzeuOJPbz8KmTsxM8KyDcwZ-2BfhT00V-2FyLL0Wo-2FV2fZGy4EkhT9Ei8MinFH96ZXU8ahDCkc2W8WcOd279tm3nhieoVBVr8u783iVpnwj2QCo0N-2BkfSMS1aFWC5RE-2FPO7JJmzTqQvbv/TC9z)_**
We’re announcing another huge endorsement this week and expanding our organizing program even more. No other campaign has our momentum, but we need to keep it up. **_[With your contribution, we will win.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3QA/ni0YAA/t.323/gOUpLn4HQ6CtNjZpJdlQlA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKwBtE4wTPxNMFBzK0q1NVJYF1kMIGmxaq5BYZANcx5IhXvk0RZNCH5MnX08fx6mbCa2LDubnhaweZcMnN3qUVBO6eLhjxW6gWVZhAC6HmmQ0hjk-2F2-2Bu-2Fnck-2F6kna4j8iD2lrlrZ0IlUYU8YHn5P8rj7T235oI-2F0q9rL7J8LwqLnDzu0wjEo7QyWblktxwuZLsiKzqpVmd8xfXmFavXVDSYPxUTTpgBYqvg8tolEiARO1-2BLzn7AaVt7Y8qrAiEgAFJsnR1D1J5cgWAx-2FlpbdzBB/d20a)_**
Thank you for everything you have done so far. This isn’t just a campaign, it’s a movement powered by real people. Now, let’s win!
Charlie Blaettler, Campaign Manager

body:
President Trump is counting on us to win this race, we need your help!
Friend --
[_**Did you see the news last Friday?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKuzok6AmquT0PjiAjlWwM4COusN9N7BuEmztNZ4ToLY6l2He8SzD5UAL2LA6JPbsLXXPDE1JtLF8u1__xHfMoGg-snKsG7DP8tk1LP33NkUXQugQ_ZrR3xFN3TmcfYp8Pqh3NyyUwgNNLo2bUylBBAA3UNQVgsOv3vqjrfcOua7SpH5I3WKqcarZKqeIoljj34c-jBv7bYPADH6TfnM87zQBF60q-vKfODl0iZK0fkQeHZvRE9OJ6A0qq_wPKahOY35TeWRtKDpswFpic5FtMbcGDDVwFWNuGqk9WM0d-Ru3novzXJ6falMFgDqIbAPUMEl1lxiai04owQ4srcpE-ezVTTHeJHnoGmtFUQ5zzIBk4Fr8FPyYA==&c=DLG--Aq2RIC6lBI_chg_10L0lBWHGA8V-YEyW5lKWxPbdnfufna-fQ==&ch=3PkiWSNb0wfLheVE_ljw6m3DRaa_F6yzYOuAkkOeJk5nZFcWSzd6bw==) President Donald Trump has endorsed Ashley Hinson in Iowa's First Congressional District race!

Friend,
I have some amazing news to share with you. President Trump has endorsed my campaign to be Iowa's First District's next Congresswoman!
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKuzok6AmquT0PjiAjlWwM4COusN9N7BuEmztNZ4ToLY6l2He8SzD5UAL2LA6JPbsLXXPDE1JtLF8u1__xHfMoGg-snKsG7DP8tk1LP33NkUXQugQ_ZrR3xFN3TmcfYp8Pqh3NyyUwgNNLo2bUylBBAA3UNQVgsOv3vqjrfcOua7SpH5I3WKqcarZKqeIoljj34c-jBv7bYPADH6TfnM87zQBF60q-vKfODl0iZK0fkQeHZvRE9OJ6A0qq_wPKahOY35TeWRtKDpswFpic5FtMbcGDDVwFWNuGqk9WM0d-Ru3novzXJ6falMFgDqIbAPUMEl1lxiai04owQ4srcpE-ezVTTHeJHnoGmtFUQ5zzIBk4Fr8FPyYA==&c=DLG--Aq2RIC6lBI_chg_10L0lBWHGA8V-YEyW5lKWxPbdnfufna-fQ==&ch=3PkiWSNb0wfLheVE_ljw6m3DRaa_F6yzYOuAkkOeJk5nZFcWSzd6bw==)
Republicans across the board are unified behind this campaign to defeat Congresswoman Finkenauer in November. I'm honored to have President Trump's support as I fight for Iowa families. [_**Will you show President Trump and me that you stand with us?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKuzok6AmquT0PjiAjlWwM4COusN9N7BuEmztNZ4ToLY6l2He8SzD5UAL2LA6JPbsLXXPDE1JtLF8u1__xHfMoGg-snKsG7DP8tk1LP33NkUXQugQ_ZrR3xFN3TmcfYp8Pqh3NyyUwgNNLo2bUylBBAA3UNQVgsOv3vqjrfcOua7SpH5I3WKqcarZKqeIoljj34c-jBv7bYPADH6TfnM87zQBF60q-vKfODl0iZK0fkQeHZvRE9OJ6A0qq_wPKahOY35TeWRtKDpswFpic5FtMbcGDDVwFWNuGqk9WM0d-Ru3novzXJ6falMFgDqIbAPUMEl1lxiai04owQ4srcpE-ezVTTHeJHnoGmtFUQ5zzIBk4Fr8FPyYA==&c=DLG--Aq2RIC6lBI_chg_10L0lBWHGA8V-YEyW5lKWxPbdnfufna-fQ==&ch=3PkiWSNb0wfLheVE_ljw6m3DRaa_F6yzYOuAkkOeJk5nZFcWSzd6bw==)

Ashley Hinson

name: Team Scheller
subject: Lisa Scheller Releases TV Ad Highlighting Trump Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Today, Lisa Scheller released a TV ad highlighting the recent endorsement from President Trump. The ads highlight the liberal positions of Dean Brown **LISA SCHELLER RELEASES TV AD HIGHLIGHTING TRUMP ENDORSEMENT** **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE ** Contact: Ryan Reynolds [press@schellerforcongress.com](mailto:press@schellerforcongress.com) May 26, 2020 ALLENTOWN, Pa. – Today, Lisa Scheller released a TV ad highlighting the recent endorsement from President Trump. | | Peter, I wanted you to be the first to see our announcement of our keynote speaker for our 2020 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner! I’m thrilled to tell you that this year’s speaker will be DCCC chair, Illinois Congresswoman Cheri Bustos! Cheri made history as the first woman elected to Congress in her district. Now, she’s joining us in the fight to take back our nation in 2020. **** Peter, 2020 will be one of the most important elections of our lives. We have the opportunity to take back the Oval Office, keep the majority in the U.S. House, elect a Democratic governor, flip the attorney general’s seat, break the supermajority in the Indiana General Assembly and win local elections across the state. But that starts with Democrats like you and me coming together and getting to work. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll join us at the 2020 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner. body:

Friend --
Congressman Rodney Davis needs your help! Far left liberals from Boston, New York, Chicago, and Hollywood are earmarking large sums of money for Downstate Illinois to defeat Rodney this November.
_**Nancy Pelosi has even directed her affiliated SuperPAC, House Majority Forward to spend heavily in this district!**_

name: Team Warner
subject: protecting the Chesapeake Bay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Derek --

The EPA was created in 1970 with the mission of protecting "human health and the environment."

Since then, EPA Administrators of both parties have carried out that mission and addressed serious environmental issues across the country, including water pollution in the Chesapeake Bay. We've made major strides toward cleaning up the Bay thanks to the EPA, but now we have work to do to protect that progress.

**President Trump appointed Andrew Wheeler to lead this critical agency last year.** Since then, Wheeler has done his level best to undermine our access to clean air and water and let his polluter friends off the hook when it comes to following emissions standards. Now, as states scramble to deal with the coronavirus pandemic, Wheeler has decided to relax the enforcement of critical environmental standards.

**[Will you add your name to our petition demanding that critical environmental laws be enforced during the pandemic?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d461/53d9897e/54955238/1c887629/1142985910/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-environment")**

It's not right to allow reckless pollution in important ecosystems like the Chesapeake Bay at any time -- and trying to brush this lack of enforcement under the rug during a pandemic is especially reprehensible. Mark Warner and a group of colleagues in the House and Senate are calling on state leaders in Virginia, Maryland, and D.C. to take steps to keep the Bay clean. But the fact remains that this is the EPA's responsibility, and Andrew Wheeler is failing to do his job.

**[Add your name and support these lawmakers as they hold the Trump administration accountable.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d461/53d9897e/54955238/1c887629/1142985910/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-environment")**

This lax attitude toward important standards comes at a price -- **our health and environment.** Ignoring pollution standards not only harms our natural spaces, it harms our health. Thank you for your support on this critical issue.

-- Team Warner

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d461/53d9897e/54955238/1c887628/1142985910/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200526_p_1_fl__589__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: The science behind wearing masks and social distancing
body:
Plus, info on our Business Town Halls
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I hope everyone had a relaxing and refreshing Memorial Day Weekend, and I hope everyone was able to take time to honor the brave men and women who have served our country. I want to thank everyone who did the right thing this weekend - abiding by social distancing, wearing face coverings and not gathering in large groups. Following the rules is the best way to keep the people around you safe.
As we approach Phase 2 and begin reopening more sectors of our economy - restaurants, gyms and personal care services among others - it's going to be more important than ever that we all follow public health guidance. Today, I want to take some time to explain why it's important that we wear our masks and stay distanced.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K4oj8nlMx_Jn8jxsIXS9BvBMxQmo5fvT-R4Z54XvQJ6Y27QlHtIpvVmhK6WJYY9vZpxcdwJfPfvPs2tIhYZ3RJbSZXqUSLKpOu2drLaU4e6ix2EksNPoL8nQfacM8GphIZm0CXrkiFyUmYDkkjKnVDA-u5Ra13y5EC8xt0s_lC5Azt-tbM3ML9p8HZeUKnoyGRaGZFnhhVExjGuKH6TcvCA5plV8lFcS&c=eo6fc4F0FgtY3mNy7dki3Nx4QKtn9nJv3I8L4gTypJFd4hnIlginXg==&ch=RSyqAPNX5ztYuPTA25abGPbwn_AmBzQwEuFy0WXqkPcYAGGrwgLo5w==)
---
| Here's why wearing a mask makes such a big difference in slowing the spread of this virus: One of the key ways this virus spreads is through inhalation exposure. When we speak, cough, or sneeze, droplets come out of our mouths. Some of the droplets we expel then evaporate into tiny particles and other people can inhale those particles. Scientists estimate these droplets can travel about 6 feet during normal conversation.
However, when we wear our cloth or surgical masks, they can reduce how far these particles travel. The mask acts like a barrier - instead of the particles traveling 6 feet, they travel less than 1 foot from you. This is why it's so important to wear a face covering. This is also why it is okay to remove your mask when you are more than 6 feet away from someone outside your household.
The goal is to minimize the particles in the air that have the potential to get others sick. Because we don't know for sure who is sick, the solution to keep the most people safe is for everyone to wear mask. My mask protects you; Your mask protects me. I'm asking all Rhode Islanders to be good neighbors.
Remember to be kind. If you see someone who isn't wearing a mask, you can offer to help them get one. We should also remember that folks with certain underlying conditions may not be able to wear a mask.
Wearing a mask still feels a bit strange, and it's a bit awkward at first - but it's something we all need to get used to. Remember: we don't leave home without our wallets and phone. Now, we don't leave home without our masks either.
Being outside often makes it easier to social distance, but studies are also showing us that outdoor air circulation is another critical tool in controlling the spread of this virus. A new study shows that the droplets we expel when we talk can hang in the air for up to 8 minutes. The longer we're inside without good air circulation, the more likely it is that these droplets could infect people - even if we're practicing proper social distancing.
On the other hand, if we're in outside space that's constantly circulating with wind, this can carry the droplets away and reduce the chance of infection through inhalation. All of that is to say, this summer is a great time to spend more time outside. In the next phase of reopening, we're going to focus on allowing more activities that can happen outside and encouraging more use of open-air settings.
---
