clean_body: Plus, info on our Business Town Halls | | | | | | | Hello friend, I hope everyone had a relaxing and refreshing Memorial Day Weekend, and I hope everyone was able to take time to honor the brave men and women who have served our country. I want to thank everyone who did the right thing this weekend - abiding by social distancing, wearing face coverings and not gathering in large groups. Following the rules is the best way to keep the people around you safe. As we approach Phase 2 and begin reopening more sectors of our economy - restaurants, gyms and personal care services among others - it's going to be more important than ever that we all follow public health guidance. Today, I want to take some time to explain why it's important that we wear our masks and stay distanced. | == | Here's why wearing a mask makes such a big difference in slowing the spread of this virus: One of the key ways this virus spreads is through inhalation exposure. When we speak, cough, or sneeze, droplets come out of our mouths. Some of the droplets we expel then evaporate into tiny particles and other people can inhale those particles. Scientists estimate these droplets can travel about 6 feet during normal conversation. However, when we wear our cloth or surgical masks, they can reduce how far these particles travel. The mask acts like a barrier - instead of the particles traveling 6 feet, they travel less than 1 foot from you. This is why it's so important to wear a face covering. This is also why it is okay to remove your mask when you are more than 6 feet away from someone outside your household. The goal is to minimize the particles in the air that have the potential to get others sick. Because we don't know for sure who is sick, the solution to keep the most people safe is for everyone to wear mask. My mask protects you; Your mask protects me. I'm asking all Rhode Islanders to be good neighbors. Remember to be kind. If you see someone who isn't wearing a mask, you can offer to help them get one. We should also remember that folks with certain underlying conditions may not be able to wear a mask. Wearing a mask still feels a bit strange, and it's a bit awkward at first - but it's something we all need to get used to. Remember: we don't leave home without our wallets and phone. Now, we don't leave home without our masks either. Being outside often makes it easier to social distance, but studies are also showing us that outdoor air circulation is another critical tool in controlling the spread of this virus. A new study shows that the droplets we expel when we talk can hang in the air for up to 8 minutes. The longer we're inside without good air circulation, the more likely it is that these droplets could infect people - even if we're practicing proper social distancing. On the other hand, if we're in outside space that's constantly circulating with wind, this can carry the droplets away and reduce the chance of infection through inhalation. All of that is to say, this summer is a great time to spend more time outside. In the next phase of reopening, we're going to focus on allowing more activities that can happen outside and encouraging more use of open-air settings. | == | To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's == for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island. | As we move into Phase Two, I know there will be lots of questions. The Rhode Island Commerce Corporation has been working hard to put together Facebook Town Halls for specific groups of business owners and anyone else interested in learning about the precautions that will be in place. This week, Commerce will host sessions for offices, gyms, restaurants and personal services. You can visit the == to see a complete listing of events and times. If you're a small business owner, I hope you'll consider joining us to learn more about our reopening plan and make your voice heard. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

We just can't afford to miss our goals if we're going to do what many think is a big hill to climb and defeat an 18-year incumbent.

Taylor's right. Our grassroots team has done it before and I know that we can do it again with your help. **[Can you pitch in today to help us reach our monthly goal?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890023/7f51f7bc/4e0ecd28/4ef6aa10/1833055017/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200526.2nd__1470__&amount=10")**

name: Brian Fitzpatrick
subject: No “safe-injection” sites
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
body:
As I’m sure you have read, this is a make-or-break moment for our community’s safety. [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=ff49f92779fb486db15dfa0f7b465005&_e=2fr4WZM7Xul_tiJ5uoZAMWG9opWtdiJNGL_aocGajodMHnWL4gwhRGlfC8C8BRddSeojCYCMrfkLLZ8GzFYgHw0hBshuZmV41sIiKGuhx0A5fKvIiWDzpCudQS8CyIHRSax6p0PkdKT9FIFyHHgXm0T2TQ_fQpHUlQyeZOKakGWDk3Ax3LoHEYZ6_h2CJaJ1R-HOkQWGeZWYmr14OPcEunO7hRaSIjZCSUjyKUuEnmWa2HHb-r3zplbuJRDrBwM7usemw83Jhv9lCI4JLsc3FiwzcAO3ftdOF-fFiTTERzX993rsMyhvUrUUX_bEs8Ab) Friend, As I’m sure you have read, this is a make-or-break moment for our community’s safety. There is currently a dangerous and misguided effort underway that would allow so-called “safe injection” sites into our community. I need your help to stop this threat to our community. Along with Senator Pat Toomey, [I am leading the fight](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=ff49f92779fb486db15dfa0f7b465005&_e=2fr4WZM7Xul_tiJ5uoZAMdV0X7wegHiu7cuFrowRd9Xwj48MTU71AIGnhdgbut2AcU4xZJa4W1kpqdfF8yEhpouVe4-DMq5Buklvo2QxB7gNUTfO6Hgyii3TjTL1ROqwL_6CVzUzGYctdwaSimnmtjrYPzsjhOcLZ4spdIo29-uN3IILJKKHlfOW_LwP8P2zHfLokgKzkyXrTwI5RAQE6bhq2r7i40dBbCLfBguE25VChpTh6RkgbZEp7OB8OOxav8vtydAZ0U3E_11OtgrpPq0HxFd9NCF0rHkZ5qGv8IvlkjqwblqDsGP-LdReAwiPjodCgHJbtUltbwSpFT2grgaxcBagXYE6GzZi1awDZYZzo_KwE4zcxeaX5NTBRsHFqUlVczOOUp_LZsoXTnmqjUAE_647jVK1ntZqABXhIFSlhDHn1iTH0mDiIbhN3PcWlltKeBWzRLXOzEekT9ITx0HY_Loqknb7s04Lvjh-x75WdjLkvzh9HNUFd7Vnq7We) in preventing these sites and protecting our community and our children from this misguided and dangerous proposal. Our goal for helping those in recovery must be to give them a light at the end of the tunnel and hope for the future. This approach does neither and I won’t stand for it. **[Join me and Senator Toomey in taking a stand against safe-injection sites](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=ff49f92779fb486db15dfa0f7b465005&_e=2fr4WZM7Xul_tiJ5uoZAMWG9opWtdiJNGL_aocGajodMHnWL4gwhRGlfC8C8BRddSeojCYCMrfkLLZ8GzFYgH-56uyBmvjw6WRVZueg8n2pGm5WZnWNzcCLrY8fOb_V7B7w8p7Qe52ceRnCVQma76ViUV0thWTOZhGkbcBd1qw5U7m4VeEpDSdMqx3SBb4CCCVT5wZmlS54wr4m-lYq0HofRy9l0bZLYvesBEs9N34JOJ13V0pZJgo7FP7BmLG4wrwTkCSaMAfN2s2XyoMf4qY5LRuGalL5oSC4bBS6KtgAuG_xLZ9JMhBnSQa2dS1OEHsOTTm6qVaMP76POS6ZqDAqQErfdEnhH9vW_3dcJD6k%3D)** We cannot and will not put the safety of our community at risk. Please join Senator Pat Toomey and I in this mission. Our community, and our children, are counting on us. Brian Fitzpatrick

Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress

Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
PO Box 939
Langhorne, PA 19047
This email is sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. To unsubscribe from future emails use this [link.](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_s=ff49f92779fb486db15dfa0f7b465005&_t=zNUVntU_dIUo2OtLeU5d-lpKZGSwuupxwZgmMtvGyi1FS9wEGg0T8okZPpDxZiJjibJcvUmsS553ECWlYfWg9M76szikFaOqRC5U7GxFP8Wqt0aBIWWFh9_hWpsslGXCUfSWSosBxHOYPAtIRvmFgi-WNyAuhB1RSkwZghvRwY0%3D)
[Privacy Policy](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=ff49f92779fb486db15dfa0f7b465005&_e=2fr4WZM7Xul_tiJ5uoZAMVsima7FryMKcpcOaccoeAUuZnrE_phjbU8wTxKUwvlYzOK_2GaVPFXuyPS4Qdoa6afV6_L7vGfNbjhGx9jfEycCpALygHhCNqOVFGUtTP87vT72ML8sIafBiRr1Z0LrfDCaYPUoGcOetZTo3jBmMgvCx8So6ET08ziII_AkD50Y-0Gh1OMh88GLs04JTRspdFode0ayw10b5jSwdb2HnXtTcS3WiAoIIy5x50HgNvi9RVhP9Y2Gupoykauhk5SMtw-OoFsj5pN4ugQ4BqEK-P9MoNytzj_TsnTqnU8sSph5) \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Mayor, Governor, Brewpub owner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

Throughout our work in the Senate addressing the coronavirus pandemic, I've been thankful for a bipartisan commitment to helping people get through this crisis. But it's also become even clearer to me that if we want to put families, workers, and local governments on the path to recovery and prosperity, the best thing we can do is flip the Senate to Democratic control in November. With more Democrats in the Senate, we can prioritize the critical work of protecting affordable health care, ensuring a liveable wage, and supporting public servants like teachers and firefighters. [**That's why I'm writing to you today about a great Democrat who's running for Senate: John Hickenlooper.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1700/3e0906/7820d591/3e30d8f2/1877852477/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-hickenlooper?refcode=20200526_TK_Hickenlooper&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Thats+why+Im+writing+to+you+today+about+&utm_campaign=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&source=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper") John was the mayor of Denver, governor of Colorado, and -- something I love about him -- he was the founder and owner of the Wynkoop Brewing Company brewpub. He knows what it's like to run a small business, to manage a city, and to balance the needs of a big, diverse state. Now, John's running for the U.S. Senate against a Republican incumbent who falls in line with Donald Trump on everything from presidential war powers to building a border wall. It's one of the most closely-watched races in the country and one of our prime opportunities to pick up a seat for the Democrats. If we want to have a chance at flipping the Senate, John has to win in November. I know it's a difficult time to think about making a political contribution. If you're able to spare a few dollars to a campaign that could really use your support -- and one that represents a big chance at gaining a Democratic majority -- I'd really appreciate it. [**If you can, click here to chip in $15 or more directly to John Hickenlooper's campaign for U.S. Senate in Colorado.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1700/3e0906/7820d591/3e30d8f1/1877852477/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-hickenlooper?refcode=20200526_TK_Hickenlooper&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+If+you+can+click+here+to+chip+in+15+or+m&utm_campaign=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&source=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $15**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1700/3e0906/7820d591/3e30d8f0/1877852477/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-hickenlooper?refcode=20200526_TK_Hickenlooper&amount=15&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+15&utm_campaign=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&source=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper")
---
| [**DONATE $25**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1700/3e0906/7820d591/3e30d8f7/1877852477/VEsC/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-hickenlooper?refcode=20200526_TK_Hickenlooper&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&source=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1700/3e0906/7820d591/3e30d8f6/1877852477/VEsD/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-hickenlooper?refcode=20200526_TK_Hickenlooper&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&source=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1700/3e0906/7820d591/3e30d8f5/1877852477/VEsA/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-hickenlooper?refcode=20200526_TK_Hickenlooper&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper&source=20200526_FR_TK_Hickenlooper")
---
I'm proud to support John Hickenlooper, and I appreciate everything you're doing to help, too.
Thank you.
_-Tim_

* * *
|

body:
Last week's highlights from Spicer&Co | |
---
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0cacdc6b48&e=f6564bbe3b)
---

---|---
| | [](http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0cacdc6b48&e=f6564bbe3b) | [Forward](http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0cacdc6b48&e=f6564bbe3b)
---|---
| | Last Week on Spicer&Co...
---
| | I added a poll of the week question below--check it out!

We've got some great segments from last week on Spicer&Co, we had [Donald Trump, Jr](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fad5976a4e&e=f6564bbe3b). talking about his back and forth with Howard Stern, a [Columbia Professor](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6549791489&e=f6564bbe3b) who attacked a student for comments on social media, and [Joe Concha](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f634d2e60b&e=f6564bbe3b) sounded off on a profile written about a potential VP pick for Biden. We covered the latest on the campaign trail with [Donald Trump, Jr](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5fd23fe336&e=f6564bbe3b). and talked to [Congressman Mike Garcia](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b7de4aaa30&e=f6564bbe3b) who just flipped House seat in California. We also discussed reopening restaurants with country star and restaurant owner [John Rich](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b618b4c41d&e=f6564bbe3b) as well as White House economic advisor [Kevin Hassett](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=88906c8fa9&e=f6564bbe3b). Check out the highlights in the Weekly Wrap [video](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8054e96a12&e=f6564bbe3b) or each of the segments on [my YouTube page](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=127901e7af&e=f6564bbe3b).

Make sure you [subscribe to my YouTube channel](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a07e2455e7&e=f6564bbe3b) to stay up to date on all the great segments from "Spicer&Co".

“Spicer&Co” is back every night this week at 6p and 9p on Newsmax and next week we are doing a series of segments on social media censorship. I hope you'll set your DVR and tune in! Find your channel [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ce1c06169b&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a6693544c9&e=f6564bbe3b "Weekly Wrap 5.18-22")
---
Last week's Weekly Wrap video of the week's best segments.
|
---
| Check out this week's poll on my website -

**Should the Republican Party pull their convention out of North Carolina if the Governor won't guarantee they can meet in person?**

Weigh in [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=165f91407b&e=f6564bbe3b)!
---
|
---
| |
#### Help Support the Fight Against Pancreatic Cancer
This month I've teamed up with [Cameo](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b199cf9f91&e=f6564bbe3b), an app that creates personalized shoutouts for birthdays, anniversaries, etc. to raise money for [The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network.](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3a85292da4&e=f6564bbe3b)

In 2016 [I lost my father to pancreatic cancer](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5bc775214c&e=f6564bbe3b), so supporting PanCan in their fight for a cure is a cause close to my family. For the last several years I've captained a team to walk in the annual PurpleStride 5k, but this year because of coronavirus the walk has been canceled. So instead you can get a [Cameo](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=64da4f88d2&e=f6564bbe3b) shoutout from me and the proceeds will go to benefit this great cause.

Check out Cameo [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7b4ecfeac8&e=f6564bbe3b) and learn more about PanCan [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=faeb4f53ab&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| |
---
# _Leading America_
In my second book "Leading America", I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. Its even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but you can pre-order on Amazon now.

Pre-order it now [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3d91b57ddd&e=f6564bbe3b)!
---
| Thanks,

_Sean_

name: Claire
subject: Democrat Dirty Tricks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Peter \- I'm steaming mad right now. We only have one week until the election and we recently learned that liberal, pro-abortion Democrats from Washington D.C. are [spending over $250,000](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l_JUvFznMjrR-4EpF6CVesi7NRjYCQOzj743NJOrJSDkFLL7zXmk5949BzcRvq1SKUXouSHWkn8m_wMfq4e8gpAmmsyXA8vncwE44jF8qpjM9hcMyKaSl5Di4EtekAJBLlIlKIEyKK333-r84efBFy1pP1M43oa_UUsl2s437K6mNZvFOLxCF0z807HvOEVq7gjVrw0xrQ2yxvgKnmEEDxYQVvnL0NziPoFn1JBnGZvxU8fNTMSqgAqHxfxJsprf&c=VxT40k_OCLVTelsQq8pZJfGdTokVXKayOcrFy-2GPL4KDiDYAoTlFg==&ch=Tu3y4ys3gQ5k0UZLHYo0jFn8AAjJsYrhBFAUVSXlj-1xsdG0L7X0TQ==) meddling in OUR Republican Primary to get you to vote against me.
Why are they doing this? Because they know I am the only candidate who has what it takes to beat them in November. Pelosi and her allies see me as a threat to her House majority so she is trying to put her finger on the scale to help my primary opponent who lost last time.
Unfortunately, this race is close and those lying attack ads work. A race this tight could come down to just a handful of votes and we need all the help we can get to spread the word about what the Democrats are doing.
---
| Peter, you and I both know the only way we're going to save the America we love is by firing Nancy Pelosi and draining the swamp once and for all. That's why I'm asking you: [Please donate $10 or more -- every dollar you can spare before midnight -- to help us fight back against these lying Democrats, get rid of corrupt career politicians, and DRAIN THE SWAMP once and for all! ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l_JUvFznMjrR-4EpF6CVesi7NRjYCQOzj743NJOrJSDkFLL7zXmk5949BzcRvq1Se8LXF0wFJ5yyl6bJdzky2VqUFJrqiqs0X-znfKWREI-Q4UI3zBelXQCpTXJgWNgPr47ampAWgtRhTgb-syxmx0WRKRQsL9drFQPyGCh0ZIATTKiqtk7e3U3wc2DJbS-D&c=VxT40k_OCLVTelsQq8pZJfGdTokVXKayOcrFy-2GPL4KDiDYAoTlFg==&ch=Tu3y4ys3gQ5k0UZLHYo0jFn8AAjJsYrhBFAUVSXlj-1xsdG0L7X0TQ==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter \- I'm steaming mad right now. We only have one week until the election and we recently learned that liberal, pro-abortion Democrats from Washington D.C. are == meddling in OUR Republican Primary to get you to vote against me. Why are they doing this? Because they know I am the only candidate who has what it takes to beat them in November. Pelosi and her allies see me as a threat to her House majority so she is trying to put her finger on the scale to help my primary opponent who lost last time. Unfortunately, this race is close and those lying attack ads work. A race this tight could come down to just a handful of votes and we need all the help we can get to spread the word about what the Democrats are doing. | Peter, you and I both know the only way we're going to save the America we love is by firing Nancy Pelosi and draining the swamp once and for all. That's why I'm asking you: == | | | == | God bless, Claire Chase | ### | == | | | Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc. | | Claire Chase for Congress | PO Box 8010, Roswell, NM 88202 | | Sent by mailto:claire@clairechase.org

If we win, we'd be unseating two of the most entrenched Republicans who make headlines for all the wrong reasons: **David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler.**
Senator Perdue said he opposed emergency $1200 checks for American workers...
Senator Loeffler made headlines for selling off her stock right after receiving a private Senate briefing about coronavirus making its way to the U.S (benefiting to the tune of $20 million)...
_Both of these leaders epitomize what is wrong with the Republican party. They 're prioritizing their big money donors (and their own) bottom line, while leaving the rest of us behind. _**Let 's send them BOTH packing this November!**
**These two flips would be TWO of the four needed to give Democrats the Senate Majority! In a way Georgia is a 2-for-1 special for Democrats:**
**One battleground state.**
**2 flips.**

#

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If you can, will you split a contribution between Deb Haaland's re-election campaign and Warren Democrats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Now more than ever we need leaders in Washington who fight for working families, understand the root causes of the crisis we face, and know how to make big, structural change -- leaders like my friend | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852573e/45c30650/1cb0788e0/66e9d7e4/2106587700/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Now more than ever, we need leaders in Washington who fight for working families, understand the root causes of the crisis we face, and know how to make big, structural change.

In short, we need leaders like my friend Representative Deb Haaland.

Throughout her career of public service, she's lifted up the voices of people who've been left out of power.

In 2018, she was part of the wave of women who volunteered, organized, and won up and down the ticket, helping to win our Democratic House Majority.

She made history last year as one of the first Native American women to serve in Congress, and she's helped lead the charge to level the playing field for working people.

**Now, she's up for re-election, and I'm honored to endorse her again. She's ready to keep up the fight, but she can't do it alone -- as a grassroots movement, we need to fight by her side. And she's got a critical fundraising goal to hit before this end-of-month deadline.

[If you can make a contribution at this time, will you split a donation of $2 or whatever makes sense for you to help re-elect Deb Haaland and support other Democratic candidates like her across the country?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852573e/45c30650/1cb0788e0/66e9d7e7/2106587700/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWRoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIxNEZfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNTI2X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-dh?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR14F_ANN_END_E_20200526_V1S3_P")**

Deb got in the fight to make real, systemic change, and, since coming into office, has never backed down from protecting working families.

That's one of the reasons why I chose her as my campaign co-chair.

I'm honored to support her re-election and proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with her in the fight to create a government that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and the powerful.

But here's the thing about fighting for working people and standing up to powerful interests: It can make you some powerful enemies. And that makes grassroots support even more vital.

Along with leaders like Deb, I'm grateful to be in this fight by your side, because no one person can make change all by themselves -- it takes a movement.

**[If you're able to, please make a contribution to help re-elect Deb Haaland, strengthen Warren Democrats' organizing efforts, and send a message that we're still in this fight all the way.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852573e/45c30650/1cb0788e0/66e9d7e7/2106587700/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWRoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIxNEZfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNTI2X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-dh?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR14F_ANN_END_E_20200526_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852573e/45c30650/1cb0788e0/66e9d7e7/2106587700/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWRoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIxNEZfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNTI2X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-dh?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR14F_ANN_END_E_20200526_V1S3_P")
---

| ,

First and foremost, I would like to thank you for taking the time to read these Chronicles.

While I know at times this Primary has gotten heated, **I believe it is imperative to set the record straight and distinguish myself as the only true Pro-Trump Conservative in this race.**

For our final segment in the Chronicles, we will discuss Lisa Scheller’s close personal relationship with Obama and his administration.

Classic Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller claims that she’s against corporate handouts.

But once again, the facts say differently.

_**Lisa Scheller claims she opposes these million-dollar handouts; UNLESS they directly benefit her and her company.**_

**During the Great Recession, Lisa Scheller took nearly _ HALF A MILLION DOLLARS_ of stimulus from the Obama Administration and used it to install solar panels at her privately owned company.**
_**[You can even see for yourself.](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=b5f2640ef1&e=6800876418)
[CLICK HERE TO SEE THE PROOF!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=ea84622bde&e=6800876418)**_
**Her company took this money with absolutely ZERO oversight.**

It’s possible that Lisa Scheller simply used Obama’s money as a nice little “Christmas Bonus.”

Or maybe, she’s been using Obama’s money to fund her political campaigns? I’m sure that is why she has no problem writing her campaign a check for around $600,000!!

**So when Lisa Scheller says she believes one thing, she usually acts on the exact opposite.** **
_Particularly if it involves stealing from the American taxpayers!_**
, I cannot fight Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller, and her Obama Administration money on my own. I need your support now, before it is too late.

_**I encourage you to make a donation of $100, $50, or even just $10 to my campaign right now!!**_

| | _**Here is what I know about Lisa Scheller:**_ _She likes to hire expensive Harrisburg and D.C. consultants to do her dirty work.

She is Pro-Abortion.

She is Anti-Trump.

She is Pro-Sanctuary City.

She is Pro-Tax Increases.

She is Against Mental Health Funding.

She loves Barack Obama and the money he gave her!_
So, while Lisa Scheller may claim one thing, she will always act the other way. Just like all of the other current RINO’s in office.

**_There is only one true Pro-Trump Conservative out there, and that is me._**

The truth is, Lehigh Valley does not need another Washington Establishment politician trying to run things from their cozy corner office in D.C.

Together, we can restore Lehigh Valley and bring back Conservative values that built this great country.

**I am here to work for you. I am here to work for the people of Pennsylvania’s 7th district. And most importantly, I am here to serve the best interests of the United States of America.**

Election Day is coming soon, and I hope you will support me in this Primary.

I urge you to make a small donation to my campaign so I can continue fighting for these next couple of weeks.

**For Liberty,**

| **Dean Browning

_**[You can even see for yourself.](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=38ab280114&e=6800876418)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump honors our fallen heroes on Memorial Day
body:
Yesterday, Americans paused to remember the men and women who have laid down their lives to protect our country... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=369fcba3e2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 26, 2020
---
| | |
# **🇺🇸 ****President Trump honors our fallen heroes**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1de0d6b366&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Yesterday, Americans** paused to remember the men and women who have laid down their lives to protect our country—our freedoms, our way of life, and our home.

**More** **than 1 million** U.S. service members have made the ultimate sacrifice since our Founding. For Memorial Day, President Trump honored these fallen warriors by visiting two important, historic sites.

**At Arlington National Cemetery,** the President joined Vice President Mike Pence, First Lady Melania Trump, and Second Lady Karen Pence for a wreath laying ceremony. After the playing of our National Anthem, President Trump stepped up to the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier to give an honorary salute.

**Later,** **he traveled **to Baltimore’s Fort McHenry, the place where American troops held back a British invasion more than 200 years ago.

**🎬****WATCH:** [President Trump visits Fort McHenry](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb13e06f59&e=3ee4985eea)

**A fleet of some 30 warships** attacked the fort relentlessly for 25 hours in September 1814. Through the smoke of battle, America’s battered flag stood strong. It was a symbol of the perseverance of U.S. forces, fighting off invasion and preserving our independence.

**“Every time** we sing our anthem, every time its rousing chorus swells our hearts with pride, we renew the eternal bonds of loyalty to our fallen heroes. We think of the soldiers who spent their final heroic moments on distant battlefields to keep us safe at home,” President Trump said.

**“We remember** the young Americans who never got the chance to grow old but whose legacy will outlive us all.”

[WATCH: Veterans honored at White House “Rolling to Remember” motorcycle event](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3d0e09a8e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **🎓****First Lady Melania Trump's message for 2020 graduates**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=34b3598529&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **When Coronavirus struck,** the class of 2020 saw their lives change unexpectedly. Many students have missed out on traditional rites of passage this spring, including senior proms, graduation ceremonies, and other important celebrations.

**President Trump** and First Lady Melania Trump want these students to know that our country stands with them. On Friday, the First Family hosted a group of students from across education levels for a special graduation ceremony at the White House.

**“You should all** be proud of yourselves for crossing the finish line in this chapter of your lives,” the First Lady said. “Although today might not look or feel quite like you imagined, you’re still surrounded by the pride, love, and support of your family, friends, community, and our country.”

**America’s future** is in good hands because of students like these. Our class of 2020 has set an example for the world—no disruption will stop them from pursuing their dreams.

[In photos: Class of 2020 grads celebrate at the White House!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ad288327d5&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **President Trump to students:** [Your future will not be defined by this pandemic](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9780ebbe2d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump participates in the Memorial Day wreath-laying ceremony at the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier** | May 25, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=01746e0356&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bca272ff66&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=761d3a9af7)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

clean_body: Friends, There are less than six months until election day, and the DCCC is pulling out all the stops to keep Two-Faced-Tom in the Swamp. Just this morning, the DCCC announced that they’ve set aside $1.83 million to block Republicans from taking back CD-01. We cannot allow Nancy Pelosi to control our future. It is time to start fighting back! Friend, the Democrats are pulling out all the stops to reelect Tom because they know he’ll rubber-stamp their radical agenda. Our district is unique, and we face some unique challenges -- including important land and water issues that politicians in D.C. fail to remember. $1.83 million is coming for Tom O’Halleran this fall. Can you help us respond? Unlike Tom O’Halleran, our campaign isn’t funded by outside donors who couldn’t find our district on a map. We’re running a grassroots campaign funded by people like YOU. That means we need your support NOW to help us fight back. Thank you, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: Can’t win the vote? Suppress it!
body:
No, vote-by-mail isn’t a left-wing conspiracy. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6QA/ni0YAA/t.323/yCaR8AWVScaDk4uwKzl2YQ/h0/JNCkEEFZowJokrW2UsHTjnWDm8s9fPBOm3K9t7TFUId-2BjWrqqfrUlr5OgQ-2BFTiELT6QYp4m7Wpa-2FEypK86oXiZ2yHJ5A5igv-2FLEbP7dF47POPqJaGLJIBVNAaOvOO1scaVVtrtnvf-2BB-2FP7sX5u9L1HISJcnqxmMB50Kt6XEF1SanL42k0moJjejHylQtn7OzK5oqMeUJyzYRAU-2Bx4l4mu7QFeZAGopj-2FtNpCg-2FK-2FyaE57aE47-2FLd97mnQErOoqZA/4zEm) Listen, it’s no surprise that Trump is pushing back hard on vote-by-mail.

He knows that when more people vote, Democrats win — so he’s taking a page from the classic Republican playbook, engineering a lower turnout and stoking baseless fears of voter fraud.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6QA/ni0YAA/t.323/yCaR8AWVScaDk4uwKzl2YQ/h1/cmEQ8NBWTYcVh08zZ2c9Z3RVexrknUhPBa79xqndFGs-2Bd4kefKfQxSzUEBc3-2B6C90di6-2BhosXrmT9mVAURiuy6-2FV3asQndGRunPlAcWaa862TKycseWK6QOWTRlM9Tv0s6ac1xqoB-2FqLohmS-2FtBlaxtoHHom0fIzoM6L-2BGp-2BgxPXysjY7ffUD1gZrLJty7TLGFsTx4I0LzvG2rOEnvetBKUvaZXN7Sms04KUdbGgRFbLY7nMwcsdpaXBpRt1X8mt/Zouj) You don’t need us to explain the President’s thought process here. In the political calculus of securing a second term, protecting Trump went up against American lives, and protecting Trump came out on top.

Now he’s trying to minimize turnout in the face of a pandemic, knowing that he's putting the lives of American voters at risk.

**[Don’t let Trump manipulate the results of the 2020 election. There’s far too much at stake. Share this post from Elisa on the danger Trump is forcing upon Americans for his own political gain.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6QA/ni0YAA/t.323/yCaR8AWVScaDk4uwKzl2YQ/h2/oltU14RZOTjwUvdc-2B-2FK1tDrPKIkIgMwYRGyKfjHtdSb3-2BDPvpUd9NgNPs8DyziIaT3Dy4cnx74MTBats0zTFIbyW-2BCStpkLAPQ03-2Bkppv3ZZ7iuPzpTYPbIbXh2iVhLIFChsi4Z9QaQHbI0M7Rljvfiq2AfzJDigfO1-2Bz2LQLjhNWrCLGRjOTfDkD-2F1Nr83KZPiEPb1gy8AWRhCki-2BSxdd-2BJV18p-2ByvX5xSAEnZSVUi6YFP2-2Bje84zo9Fv9x97C2KCQhsGUYvvM4Wj0Gnnu3hYs-2FyI3Ia-2BMje6Fhx4Y0nE4-3D/rQXr)**

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6QA/ni0YAA/t.323/yCaR8AWVScaDk4uwKzl2YQ/h3/oltU14RZOTjwUvdc-2B-2FK1tDrPKIkIgMwYRGyKfjHtdSb3-2BDPvpUd9NgNPs8DyziIaT3Dy4cnx74MTBats0zTFIdv1zWvxPf10hYzHEsjjt-2F6PjasN-2F1K2HuKyjSpQeB6Ublq-2BXZXAura1CnVipEVaNo0S6HszLd1jZ0LqyE4-2BiDXoTjkEFwbfmhUXDGJ8Alrcp0mAz-2FrOvZ-2Ft52L2kS2iC-2BmtLC1fKPGj7EoSMvrjFu1pNbSf3IoFBi5DNYODpqnldmkI88QCZFe3F3uFnq58CJquzI-2Bkr99vRkFemRZaZo0-3D/9V9O) So what can we do to counter Trump’s disinfo around vote-by-mail? Well, it’s pretty easy: Share the stories of actual Americans, not the opinions of corrupt politicians or right-wing media outlets. Remind him that real people — our veterans, our grandparents, and millions of other Americans — depend on vote by mail. The real scam is making our neighbors choose between protecting their votes and protecting their lives.

**[Trump is making it clear that he’ll gamble with American lives if it’ll win him a second term. Share this post to amplify the message that our loved ones will not be victims of his political crossfire.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6QA/ni0YAA/t.323/yCaR8AWVScaDk4uwKzl2YQ/h4/oltU14RZOTjwUvdc-2B-2FK1tDrPKIkIgMwYRGyKfjHtdSb3-2BDPvpUd9NgNPs8DyziIaT3Dy4cnx74MTBats0zTFITidFkv-2BWvxUyfSZJ7iDxQNf4suLe4duTHovPH2iYqjQpsfdGX2HCNg8UPMSasgmb0vz9mZPwJr1aUd8KwUTUM-2F3GeO6K19A9NTNvAqrKJpxQFOcDKNYBg46IuFTe83b-2FXMNddpnhmxjrpT4h6F8YMaEIVGhFlEVsUHaSxhGnxAPLzcBMoHIsIb8btaT-2FjyWDeHZ4MUBLWA8lXoiBC9P938-3D/D1pJ)**

Thanks,

The Defeat Disinfo Team

P.S. Fighting against Trump’s disinformation campaigns costs money. We know times are tough right now, but, if you can, ******[chip in $5 to make sure Trump is a one-term president and competent leaders can start repairing the mess that he’s made.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6QA/ni0YAA/t.323/yCaR8AWVScaDk4uwKzl2YQ/h5/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNII0-2Bssn41oEhsR47MncZ3Syi7M8pf0F4wg9lz5P9WjLTDEewunV6GUuSLCDFcjBYksxnDW2DzUrte24lT0E-2FG5g0PH4owZ9twBX46OGN5texijv7kKc-2BoVn-2BACoND53kgZULoJxgMkKxFQeJIw3qCT41eHjZs6d0r5x8z4HJ4fEOea0RZNEzqWA5XYISoh-2BFzm2bCRsof5TWOD-2FLs2oUXiGsd3aq8tfWgS-2FtEZ2Mg6G0kuL5a0RgrVEdDmLqcolOtnfFoUtM6lWMgPQLUzyQf723SJyU6-2B2ORoHDc-2Fd5Z-2BtVNH04hUcGbMrODjMLLZ3s2THIF14h6GUEOz2RgmmnftWRpUxoTpwPsi5AgEJqjTsw-3D-3D/qQKS) **

_If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies[here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6QA/ni0YAA/t.323/yCaR8AWVScaDk4uwKzl2YQ/h6/JNCkEEFZowJokrW2UsHTjnWDm8s9fPBOm3K9t7TFUIfjbSdvgqVJEflQpz-2F4z8iTf1PPxz7m-2FlEDb3wD1HlPDL-2FwBQ3E5I8YVFk6JiXWKkNajI0hdYOmlh7wRQrXesG6N4-2Fos6-2FLN44LxfJ4-2FNd50qJHRrvd4fJW6n3aOqY2V-2BHcxqndf2QJIFjDTeeVQxxfXxKzAY4gyT0V2LyLgpJ4B-2ByEdI1CTTbuGDbgrnizzFnoeHdg6VC0R-2F5OLCC6VvO9/WCdh)._

name: Warnock for Georgia
subject: Will you add your name now to endorse our people-powered campaign for Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Join John Lewis and Stacey Abrams in the fight to restore moral leadership to Washington. >>
| | |
---
Friend,

This month, we learned that our opponent, Kelly Loeffler (R), bought $4 million in TV ads to attack Democrats and prop up her campaign.
That's only a fraction of the $20 million of her personal fortune she has pledged to buy this seat. She'll spend whatever it takes to win this race, and Mitch McConnell is lining up the full backing of the Republican establishment to help her do it.
There's a reason Kelly Loeffler, Mitch McConnell and GOP megadonors are gearing up to stop our campaign: **They know we 've got what it takes to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. **
But the truth is that Reverend Warnock (D) won't be able to win this fight alone. He's running to restore moral leadership to Washington and give every Georgian a voice in their government - and he needs people like you fighting alongside him.
**That 's why we set a goal to get 5,000 grassroots supporters to personally endorse Reverend Warnock's people-powered campaign for Senate, and we're counting on you to be one of them: [_Will you add your name now to join us in our fight to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/warnock-personal-endorsement?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk203-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk203-su-nd")**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/warnock-personal-endorsement?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk203-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk203-su-nd")
When you sign on to our campaign, you're joining tens of thousands of people who are fighting for the issues that matter most to Georgians - from affordable health care to voting rights to the dignity of working people.
Right now, a new poll shows we _can_ flip Georgia blue - and it's all because of the incredible grassroots movement we've built together. But if we're going to bring this momentum all the way to the ballot box, we need to know you're with us for the long haul. **Strong Democratic leaders like Rep. John Lewis, Stacey Abrams and Sen. Kamala Harris have already endorsed our fight to flip Georgia blue - but we're still missing one critical endorsement: yours. **
**[_Please, friend: Sign on now to be one of the 5,000 grassroots supporters we need to personally endorse our campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia. It 'll mean so much to Reverend Warnock to have your support. _](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/warnock-personal-endorsement?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk203-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk203-su-nd")**
Only with you by our side can we take back the Senate for Democrats and return moral leadership to Washington.
Let's do this.

Team Warnock

clean_body: Join John Lewis and Stacey Abrams in the fight to restore moral leadership to Washington. >> | | | Friend, This month, we learned that our opponent, Kelly Loeffler (R), bought $4 million in TV ads to attack Democrats and prop up her campaign. That's only a fraction of the $20 million of her personal fortune she has pledged to buy this seat. She'll spend whatever it takes to win this race, and Mitch McConnell is lining up the full backing of the Republican establishment to help her do it. There's a reason Kelly Loeffler, Mitch McConnell and GOP megadonors are gearing up to stop our campaign: They know we 've got what it takes to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. But the truth is that Reverend Warnock (D) won't be able to win this fight alone. He's running to restore moral leadership to Washington and give every Georgian a voice in their government - and he needs people like you fighting alongside him. That 's why we set a goal to get 5,000 grassroots supporters to personally endorse Reverend Warnock's people-powered campaign for Senate, and we're counting on you to be one of them: "" "" When you sign on to our campaign, you're joining tens of thousands of people who are fighting for the issues that matter most to Georgians - from affordable health care to voting rights to the dignity of working people. Right now, a new poll shows we can flip Georgia blue - and it's all because of the incredible grassroots movement we've built together. But if we're going to bring this momentum all the way to the ballot box, we need to know you're with us for the long haul. Strong Democratic leaders like Rep. John Lewis, Stacey Abrams and Sen. Kamala Harris have already endorsed our fight to flip Georgia blue - but we're still missing one critical endorsement: yours. "" Only with you by our side can we take back the Senate for Democrats and return moral leadership to Washington. Let's do this. Team Warnock | | "" | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. _**Let's be real.**_

We'll never stop calling out BS, whether it comes from the fake news media or "Democrats-in-Disguise"(RINO wannabes) trying to infiltrate the Republican U.S. Senate Primary!

If you missed yesterday's “Freedom March of New Jersey” (where I put **both** on notice!), [check out my speech here](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=ba78bf7de4&e=3e017fab0f).

| |
# Hirsh Singh Calls for Opening NJ and Exposes Democrat Infiltration of GOP

**LINWOOD, NJ** — Hundreds of people joined Republican candidate for United States Senate Hirsh Singh in chanting "Shame on Phil Murphy" at Point Pleasant in New Jersey, which was the site of the 'Freedom March of NJ' on Memorial Day.

A number of speakers and supporters gathered at the site of the protest to demand that New Jersey be opened immediately, but the star of the show was easily Hirsh Singh, who enthused the crowd into joining him as they chanted slogans against the state's Governor. Hirsh Singh pointed out that quarantine was for the sick and not the healthy. His point that everything the media reported was about fear while America was the “land of the free” because it was the “home of the brave” struck a chord with the crowd that had assembled for the rally.

Earlier in the event, organizers took away Hirsh Singh's speaking slot and gave it to his opponent, Rikin Mehta. The move backfired on both the organizers as well as Mehta when Mehta's lackluster performance ended with him being exposed as a Democrat and member of Big Pharma.

Mehta's history includes voting for Obama, supporting Obamacare, getting a political appointment from Democrat mayors and getting on the ballot for this year's polls by using Democrat Party operators to circulate his petition. Mehta has also headed pharmaceutical behemoth Pfizer's regulatory policy, which includes selling abortion pills camouflaged as ulcer medications. This policy of Pfizer has been termed "Pills for Mail Order Abortion" by its critics and has angered pro-life conservatives.

Pro-life voters around the state have sworn to defeat Mehta and vote for Hirsh Singh. Singh has been a staunch conservative all his life and supported Donald Trump right from the start in June 2015. He is the only candidate in the U.S. Senate race who has never supported a Democrat or been a Democrat himself. Another opponent of Singh, Tricia Flanagan, donated the maximum amount of money to the Democrat Governor as well as Presidential candidate Bill Richardson.

Hirsh Singh stated during his speech that he would win the election and put an end to the career of Cory Booker.
###

**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Gross Abuses of Power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
In the final days of the Obama administration, high level officials were engaged in outrageous efforts to undermine President Trump. We know that during the campaign, the Obama administration was spying on Trump campaign officials.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42587557&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjU1OTk0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

In the final days of the Obama administration, high level officials were engaged in outrageous efforts to undermine President Trump.

We know that during the campaign, the Obama administration was spying on Trump campaign officials.

The highest levels of the Obama Administration, including Joe Biden, were involved in this scheme to undermine President Trump.

**The Republican Senate Majority is issuing subpoenas to top Obama officials so we can get to the bottom of this scandal.**

****
[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1ODc1NTcS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjU1OTk0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

We are calling James Comey, Andrew McCabe, Sally Yates, James Clapper and others to testify under oath.

The liberal media will surely try to hide and downplay this scandal, but we cannot allow these questions to go unanswered.

[**Add your name if you agree we must hold the Obama administration accountable.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1ODc1NTcS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjU1OTk0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Despite interference from the Obama administration, Donald Trump won in 2016 and now we need to know why the highest levels of the Obama team were actively spreading misinformation.

[**Add your name if you agree we must hold the Obama administration accountable.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1ODc1NTcS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjU1OTk0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In service,

Tom
